(** exploring the isomorphism between [A × B --> C] and [[B, [A,C]]] for categories A, B, C

Authors: Ralph Matthes 2021
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.UnitorsAndAssociatorsForEndofunctors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Biadjunction.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.

Import Bicat.Notations.

Local Open Scope cat.

Local Definition CAT : bicat := bicat_of_cats.

Section ThePseudoFunctors.

Section ProductWithFixedSecondArgument.

  Context (B0 : ob CAT).

  Local Definition productwithfixedelement (A: ob CAT) : ob CAT := category_binproduct A B0.



B0: CAT
psfunctor_data CAT CAT


B0: CAT
psfunctor_data CAT CAT

  
B0: CAT
CAT → CAT
B0: CAT
∏ a b : CAT, CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧ → CAT ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b ⟧
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : CAT) (f g : CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g → ?F₁ a b f ==> ?F₁ a b g
B0: CAT
∏ a : CAT, id₁ (?F₀ a) ==> ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
B0: CAT
∏ (a b c : CAT) (f : CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : CAT ⟦ b, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b f · ?F₁ b c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

  
B0: CAT
CAT → CAT
 exact productwithfixedelement.
  
B0: CAT
∏ a b : CAT,
CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ CAT ⟦ productwithfixedelement a,
  productwithfixedelement b ⟧
 
B0, A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
CAT ⟦ productwithfixedelement A,
productwithfixedelement A' ⟧

    exact (pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))).
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : CAT) (f g : CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g
→ (λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
   pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a b f ==>
  (λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
   pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a b g
 
B0, A, A': CAT
F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) A A' F ==>
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) A A' G

F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))
⟹ pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))

nat_trans_data

is_nat_trans

  ?t

ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
precategory_binproduct_data A' B0

F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
a: A
b: B0
precategory_binproduct_data A' B0
⟦ pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))
    (a,, b),
pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))
  (a,, b) ⟧

      
B0, A, A': CAT
F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
a: A
b: B0
precategory_binproduct_mor A' B0
  (make_catbinprod (F a) b) (make_catbinprod (G a) b)

      exact (pr1 α a ,, identity b).
    
B0, A, A': CAT
F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
is_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  ((λ ab : precategory_binproduct_data A B0,
    (λ (a : A) (b : B0),
     pr1 α a,, id₁ b
     :
     precategory_binproduct_data A' B0
     ⟦ pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))
         (a,, b),
     pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))
       (a,, b) ⟧) (pr1 ab) (pr2 ab))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
 
B0, A, A': CAT
F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
ab, ab': precategory_binproduct_data A B0
fg: precategory_binproduct_data A B0 ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧
# (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) fg
· (pr1 α (pr1 ab'),, id₁ (pr2 ab')) =
(pr1 α (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
· # (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
    fg

a: A
b: B0
ab': precategory_binproduct_data A B0
fg: precategory_binproduct_data A B0 ⟦ a,, b, ab' ⟧
# (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) fg
· (pr1 α (pr1 ab'),, id₁ (pr2 ab')) =
(pr1 α a,, id₁ b)
· # (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
    fg

a: A

fg: precategory_binproduct_data A B0 ⟦ a,, b, a',, b'

· (pr1 α a',, id₁ b') =

· # (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
a: A
b: B0
a': A
b': B0
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, b), pr1 (a',, b') ⟧
g: B0 ⟦ pr2 (a,, b), pr2 (a',, b') ⟧
# (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (f,, g) · (pr1 α a',, id₁ b') =
(pr1 α a,, id₁ b)
· # (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
    (f,, g)

      
B0, A, A': CAT
F, G: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
α: F ==> G
a: A
b: B0
a': A
b': B0
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, b), pr1 (a',, b') ⟧
g: B0 ⟦ pr2 (a,, b), pr2 (a',, b') ⟧
make_dirprod (# F f · pr1 α a') (g · id₁ b') =
make_dirprod (pr1 α a · # G f) (id₁ b · g)

f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, b), pr1 (a',, b') ⟧
g: B0 ⟦ pr2 (a,, b), pr2 (a',, b') ⟧
g · id₁ b' = g

        apply id_right.
  
B0: CAT
∏ a : CAT,
id₁ (productwithfixedelement a) ==>
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a a
  (id₁ a)
 
B0, A: CAT
id₁ (productwithfixedelement A) ==>
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) A A
  (id₁ A)

functor_identity_data
  (precategory_binproduct_data A B0)
⟹ pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))

nat_trans_data

is_nat_trans

     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) ?t

B0, A: CAT
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
precategory_binproduct_data A B0
⟦ functor_identity_data
    (precategory_binproduct_data A B0) ab,
pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
  (functor_identity (pr1 B0)) ab ⟧
 exact (identity ab).
    
B0, A: CAT
is_nat_trans
  (functor_identity_data
     (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
  (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  ((λ ab : precategory_binproduct_data A B0, id₁ ab)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
 
B0, A: CAT
ab, ab': precategory_binproduct_data A B0
fg: precategory_binproduct_data A B0 ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧
# (functor_identity_data
     (precategory_binproduct_data A B0)) fg · id₁ ab' =
id₁ ab
· # (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
       (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) fg

      
B0, A: CAT
ab, ab': precategory_binproduct_data A B0
fg: precategory_binproduct_data A B0 ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧
make_dirprod (pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
  (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')) =
make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
  (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg)

      apply pathsdirprod; rewrite id_left; apply id_right.
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b c : CAT) (f : CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : CAT ⟦ b, c ⟧),
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a b f
· (λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
   pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) b c g ==>
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a c
  (f · g)
 
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) A1 A2 F
· (λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
   pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) A2 A3 G ==>
(λ (A A' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧),
 pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) A1 A3
  (F · G)
 
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
functor_composite_data
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
⟹ pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))

    
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) ?t

    
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
 
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
precategory_binproduct_data A3 B0
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
    (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
    a1b,
pair_functor_data (F ∙ G) (functor_identity (pr1 B0))
  a1b ⟧
 apply identity.
    
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  ((λ a1b : precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0,
    id₁
      (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
         (functor_identity (pr1 B0)) a1b))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
 
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
a1b, a1b': precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
fg: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0 ⟦ a1b, a1b' ⟧
# (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  fg
· id₁
    (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
       (functor_identity (pr1 B0)) a1b') =
id₁
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)) a1b)
· # (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
       (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) fg

      
B0, A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
G: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
a1b, a1b': precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
fg: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0 ⟦ a1b, a1b' ⟧
make_dirprod
  (# G (# F (pr1 fg)) · id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b'))))
  (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b')) =
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b))) · # G (# F (pr1 fg)))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg)

      apply pathsdirprod; rewrite id_left; apply id_right.
Defined.


B0: CAT
psfunctor_laws binproductleft_map_data


B0: CAT
psfunctor_laws binproductleft_map_data

  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : a × B0, id₁ (f (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
   pathsdirprod
     (is_nat_trans_id f (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) =
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f g h : a ⟶ b) (η : f ⟹ g)
(φ : g ⟹ h),
make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data h (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : a × B0,
   η (pr1 ab) · φ (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
   pathsdirprod
     (is_nat_trans_comp η φ (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab')
        (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data h (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0, pr1 η (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax η (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data h (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0, pr1 φ (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax φ (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a ∙ f)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

              (pair_functor_data h

                  h (g (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (h (g (pr1 a1b)))

                 (# h (# g (pr1 fg)))

                        h (g (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
                  # h (# g (pr1 fg))
                  · id₁ (h (g (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
                 (id_right (# h (# g (pr1 fg))))

        (pair_functor_data g₁

        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,

        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod

           (c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 a1b)), g₁ (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)

        (internal_paths_rew_r

  (functor_composite_data

  (functor_composite_data

  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g₂
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₂)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g₂ (f (pr1 a1b)), g₂ (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 a1b)))
            · # g₂ (# f (pr1 fg)))
           (# g₂ (# f (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g₂ (f (pr1 a1b)),
                  g₂ (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # g₂ (# f (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# g₂ (# f (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# g₂ (# f (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
B0: CAT
∏ (a b c : category) (f₁ f₂ : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c)
(η : f₁ ⟹ f₂),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f₁ (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (f₁ ∙ g)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f₁
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f₁ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 a1b)), g (f₁ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 a1b)))
            · # g (# f₁ (pr1 fg)))
           (# g (# f₁ (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 a1b)),
                  g (f₁ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # g (# f₁ (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# g (# f₁ (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# g (# f₁ (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (f₁ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0,
      # (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_post_whisker a b c f₁ f₂ η g
           (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f₁ (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f₂ (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (post_whisker
     (make_nat_trans
        (pair_functor_data f₁
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data f₂
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ ab : a × B0, pr1 η (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
        (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
         pathsdirprod
           (nat_trans_ax η (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
     (pair_functor g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f₂
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g (f₂ (pr1 a1b)), g (f₂ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 a1b)))
            · # g (# f₂ (pr1 fg)))
           (# g (# f₂ (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g (f₂ (pr1 a1b)),
                  g (f₂ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # g (# f₂ (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# g (# f₂ (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# g (# f₂ (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : a × B0, id₁ (f (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
   pathsdirprod
     (is_nat_trans_id f (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) =
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

A, A': category

make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

  (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
   pathsdirprod
     (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) =
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

A, A': category

make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),

     (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))

         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) x =
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) x

A, A': category
F: A ⟶ A'
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))

B0: CAT
A, A': category
F: A ⟶ A'
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab) =
make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) (id₁ (pr2 ab))
 apply idpath.
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f g h : a ⟶ b) (η : f ⟹ g)
(φ : g ⟹ h),
make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data h (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : a × B0,
   η (pr1 ab) · φ (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
   pathsdirprod
     (is_nat_trans_comp η φ (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab')
        (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data h (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0, pr1 η (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax η (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data h (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0, pr1 φ (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax φ (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'

  (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : A × B0,
   α (pr1 ab) · β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))

   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),

     (is_nat_trans_comp α β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab')
        (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)

         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) =

  (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, pr1 α (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax α (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,

  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, pr1 β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))

           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

    
B0: CAT
A, A': category
F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'
α: F1 ⟹ F2
β: F2 ⟹ F3
∏ x : precategory_binproduct_data A B0,
make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : A × B0,
   α (pr1 ab) · β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
   pathsdirprod
     (is_nat_trans_comp α β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab')
        (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, pr1 α (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax α (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, pr1 β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) x

    
B0: CAT
A, A': category
F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'
α: F1 ⟹ F2
β: F2 ⟹ F3
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
make_nat_trans
  (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (λ ab : A × B0,
   α (pr1 ab) · β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
  (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
   (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
   pathsdirprod
     (is_nat_trans_comp α β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab')
        (pr1 fg))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
        (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
         pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
        (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))) ab =
nat_trans_comp
  (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, pr1 α (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax α (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F3 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, pr1 β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (nat_trans_ax β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  ab
 
B0: CAT
A, A': category
F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'
α: F1 ⟹ F2
β: F2 ⟹ F3
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
α (pr1 ab) · β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab) =
make_dirprod (pr1 α (pr1 ab) · pr1 β (pr1 ab))
  (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))

    
B0: CAT
A, A': category
F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'
α: F1 ⟹ F2
β: F2 ⟹ F3
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
α (pr1 ab) · β (pr1 ab) =
pr1 α (pr1 ab) · pr1 β (pr1 ab)
B0: CAT
A, A': category
F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'
α: F1 ⟹ F2
β: F2 ⟹ F3
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (pr2 ab) = id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)

    
B0: CAT
A, A': category
F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'
α: F1 ⟹ F2
β: F2 ⟹ F3
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
α (pr1 ab) · β (pr1 ab) =
pr1 α (pr1 ab) · pr1 β (pr1 ab)
 apply idpath.
    
B0: CAT
A, A': category
F1, F2, F3: A ⟶ A'
α: F1 ⟹ F2
β: F2 ⟹ F3
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (pr2 ab) = id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
 apply pathsinv0, id_left.
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a ∙ f)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a ∙ f)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : a × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (a ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : a ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (pair_functor f (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data f
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a ∙ f)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : a × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (f (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (b ⟦ f (pr1 a1b), f (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (f (pr1 a1b)) · # f (pr1 fg))
              (# f (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : b ⟦ f (pr1 a1b), f (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # f (pr1 fg) · id₁ (f (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# f (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# f (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a ∙ f)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0, id₁ (f (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id f (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
 
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : A × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)) · # F (pr1 fg))
              (# F (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # F (pr1 fg) · id₁ (F (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# F (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

    
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
∏ x : precategory_binproduct_data A B0,
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : A × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)) · # F (pr1 fg))
              (# F (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # F (pr1 fg) · id₁ (F (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# F (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) x

    
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) ab =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data A B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : A × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)) · # F (pr1 fg))
              (# F (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # F (pr1 fg) · id₁ (F (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# F (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity A ∙ F)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  ab
 
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) (id₁ (pr2 ab)) =
make_dirprod
  (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))
  (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))

    
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) =
# F (id₁ (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
· id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (pr2 ab) =
id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)

    
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) =
# F (id₁ (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
· id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
 
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) = # F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
 apply pathsinv0, functor_id.
    
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (pr2 ab) =
id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
 
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
id₁ (pr2 ab) = id₁ (pr2 ab)
 apply idpath.
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data b B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (f ∙ functor_identity b)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data b B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity b)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ functor_identity b)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pre_whisker
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data b B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity b)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : b × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : b × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor b B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (b ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : b ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data f
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity b)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (f ∙ functor_identity b)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : a × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (f (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (b ⟦ f (pr1 a1b), f (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (f (pr1 a1b)) · # f (pr1 fg))
              (# f (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : b ⟦ f (pr1 a1b), f (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # f (pr1 fg) · id₁ (f (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# f (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# f (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ functor_identity b)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0, id₁ (f (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id f (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
 
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data B B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data B B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pre_whisker
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data B B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : B × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : B × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor B B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : B ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)) · # F (pr1 fg))
              (# F (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # F (pr1 fg) · id₁ (F (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# F (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

    
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
∏ x : precategory_binproduct_data A B0,
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data B B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data B B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pre_whisker
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data B B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : B × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : B × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor B B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : B ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)) · # F (pr1 fg))
              (# F (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # F (pr1 fg) · id₁ (F (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# F (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) x

    
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
nat_trans_id
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) ab =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data B B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_identity_data
           (precategory_binproduct_data B B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pre_whisker
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (precategory_binproduct_data B B0))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ ab : B × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
           (λ (ab ab' : B × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor B B0 ab
                    ab'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : B ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 fg))
                 (id_left (pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data (functor_identity B)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (pr1 a1b)) · # F (pr1 fg))
              (# F (pr1 fg))
              (λ p : B ⟦ F (pr1 a1b), F (pr1 a1b') ⟧,
               # F (pr1 fg) · id₁ (F (pr1 a1b')) = p)
              (id_right (# F (pr1 fg)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ functor_identity B)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A × B0, id₁ (F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id F (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  ab
 
B0: CAT
A, B: category
F: A ⟶ B
ab: precategory_binproduct_data A B0
make_dirprod (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) (id₁ (pr2 ab)) =
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))
  (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))

    apply pathsdirprod; do 2 rewrite id_right; apply idpath.
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b c d : category) (f : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c)
(h : c ⟶ d),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data g
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data h
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))
  (pair_functor_data (f ∙ (g ∙ h))
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data ((f ∙ g) ∙ h)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data g
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data h
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data (g ∙ h)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ (g ∙ h))
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pre_whisker
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data g
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
              (pair_functor_data h
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (pair_functor_data (g ∙ h)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ a1b : b × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (h (g (pr1 a1b))))
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
           (λ (a1b a1b' : b × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor b B0 a1b
                    a1b'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (d ⟦ h (g (pr1 a1b)),
                  h (g (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (h (g (pr1 a1b)))
                  · # h (# g (pr1 fg)))
                 (# h (# g (pr1 fg)))
                 (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (pr1 a1b)),
                        h (g (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
                  # h (# g (pr1 fg))
                  · id₁ (h (g (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
                 (id_right (# h (# g (pr1 fg))))
                 (id_left (# h (# g (pr1 fg)))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data f
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data (g ∙ h)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (f ∙ (g ∙ h))
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : a × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 a1b)))))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 a1b))),
               h (g (f (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧)
              (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 a1b))))
               · # h (# g (# f (pr1 fg))))
              (# h (# g (# f (pr1 fg))))
              (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 a1b))),
                     h (g (f (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧,
               # h (# g (# f (pr1 fg)))
               · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 a1b')))) = p)
              (id_right (# h (# g (# f (pr1 fg)))))
              (id_left (# h (# g (# f (pr1 fg))))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ (g ∙ h))
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data ((f ∙ g) ∙ h)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0,
      id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 ab)))),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h)) (pr1 ab)
           (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data g
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data h
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data h (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data ((f ∙ g) ∙ h)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data g
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data h
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data f
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data g
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data h
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data h
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data f
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data g
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
              (pair_functor_data h
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data f
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
              (pair_functor_data g
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ a1b : a × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (g (f (pr1 a1b))))
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
           (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b
                    a1b'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (c ⟦ g (f (pr1 a1b)),
                  g (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (g (f (pr1 a1b)))
                  · # g (# f (pr1 fg)))
                 (# g (# f (pr1 fg)))
                 (λ p : c ⟦ g (f (pr1 a1b)),
                        g (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
                  # g (# f (pr1 fg))
                  · id₁ (g (f (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
                 (id_right (# g (# f (pr1 fg))))
                 (id_left (# g (# f (pr1 fg)))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (pair_functor h (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data h
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data ((f ∙ g) ∙ h)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 a1b)))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 a1b))),
            h (g (f (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧)
           (id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 a1b))))
            · # h (# g (# f (pr1 fg))))
           (# h (# g (# f (pr1 fg))))
           (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (f (pr1 a1b))),
                  h (g (f (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧,
            # h (# g (# f (pr1 fg)))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (pr1 a1b')))) = p)
           (id_right (# h (# g (# f (pr1 fg)))))
           (id_left (# h (# g (# f (pr1 fg))))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
 
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data G
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data H
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ (G ∙ H))
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data ((F ∙ G) ∙ H)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data G
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data (G ∙ H)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ (G ∙ H))
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pre_whisker
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data G
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
              (pair_functor_data H
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (pair_functor_data (G ∙ H)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (λ a1b : A2 × B0,
            make_dirprod (id₁ (H (G (pr1 a1b))))
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
           (λ (a1b a1b' : A2 × B0)
            (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A2 B0 a1b
                    a1b'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A4 ⟦ H (G (pr1 a1b)),
                  H (G (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (H (G (pr1 a1b)))
                  · # H (# G (pr1 fg)))
                 (# H (# G (pr1 fg)))
                 (λ p : A4 ⟦ H (G (pr1 a1b)),
                        H (G (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
                  # H (# G (pr1 fg))
                  · id₁ (H (G (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
                 (id_right (# H (# G (pr1 fg))))
                 (id_left (# H (# G (pr1 fg)))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data (G ∙ H)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (F ∙ (G ∙ H))
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A4 ⟦ H (G (F (pr1 a1b))),
               H (G (F (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧)
              (id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
               · # H (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))
              (# H (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))
              (λ p : A4 ⟦ H (G (F (pr1 a1b))),
                     H (G (F (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧,
               # H (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))
               · id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b')))) = p)
              (id_right (# H (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))))
              (id_left (# H (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ (G ∙ H))
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data ((F ∙ G) ∙ H)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A1 × B0,
      id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 ab)))),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F
              (functor_composite_data G H)) (pr1 ab)
           (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) =

  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

                    a1b'),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A3 ⟦ G (F (pr1 a1b)),
                  G (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b)))
                  · # G (# F (pr1 fg)))
                 (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))
                 (λ p : A3 ⟦ G (F (pr1 a1b)),
                        G (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
                  # G (# F (pr1 fg))
                  · id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
                 (id_right (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))
                 (id_left (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r

                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (pair_functor H (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))

     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)

        (pair_functor_data H

  (functor_composite_data

           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) x

A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0

  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data G
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data H
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))

     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data ((F ∙ G) ∙ H)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data G
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))

        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data (G ∙ H)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))

        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (make_nat_trans

              (pair_functor_data H
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))

              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

              (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))

                    a1b'),

                  H (G (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (H (G (pr1 a1b)))
                  · # H (# G (pr1 fg)))
                 (# H (# G (pr1 fg)))
                 (λ p : A4 ⟦ H (G (pr1 a1b)),
                        H (G (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
                  # H (# G (pr1 fg))
                  · id₁ (H (G (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
                 (id_right (# H (# G (pr1 fg))))
                 (id_left (# H (# G (pr1 fg)))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
                 (id_right (pr2 fg))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data (G ∙ H)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (pair_functor_data (F ∙ (G ∙ H))
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
         make_dirprod (id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))))
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
        (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b
                 a1b'),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (A4 ⟦ H (G (F (pr1 a1b))),
               H (G (F (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧)
              (id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
               · # H (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))
              (# H (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))

                     H (G (F (pr1 a1b'))) ⟧,
               # H (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))
               · id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b')))) = p)
              (id_right (# H (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))))
              (id_left (# H (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ (G ∙ H))
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data ((F ∙ G) ∙ H)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

      id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 ab)))),, id₁ (pr2 ab))

        (is_nat_trans_id

              (functor_composite_data G H)) (pr1 ab)
           (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
