           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)

nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data

              (pair_functor_data H

        (make_nat_trans

        (pair_functor_data H

B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
   · id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
   · id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)) =
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
   · # H (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
   · id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b))

    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))) · id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
· id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))) =
id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
· # H (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
· id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))

A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0

id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)

    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))) · id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
· id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))) =
id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
· # H (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b))))

B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0

# H (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
· id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b))))
 
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (H (G (F (pr1 a1b)))) =
# H (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b))))

      apply pathsinv0, functor_id.
    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3, A4: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
H: A3 ⟶ A4
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) =
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)
 apply idpath.
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b c : category) (f : a ⟶ b) (g₁ g₂ : b ⟶ c)
(η : g₁ ⟹ g₂),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g₁ (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₁)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₂)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g₁
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₁)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 a1b)), g₁ (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 a1b)))
            · # g₁ (# f (pr1 fg)))
           (# g₁ (# f (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g₁ (f (pr1 a1b)),
                  g₁ (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # g₁ (# f (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (g₁ (f (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# g₁ (# f (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# g₁ (# f (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₁)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₂)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0,
      pr1 η (pr1 f (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_pre_whisker a b c f g₁ g₂ η
           (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g₁ (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g₂ (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₂)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pre_whisker
     (pair_functor_data f (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (make_nat_trans
        (pair_functor_data g₁
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g₂
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ ab : b × B0, pr1 η (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
        (λ (ab ab' : b × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor b B0 ab ab'),
         pathsdirprod
           (nat_trans_ax η (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g₂
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f ∙ g₂)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g₂ (f (pr1 a1b)), g₂ (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 a1b)))
            · # g₂ (# f (pr1 fg)))
           (# g₂ (# f (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g₂ (f (pr1 a1b)),
                  g₂ (f (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # g₂ (# f (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (g₂ (f (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# g₂ (# f (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# g₂ (# f (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
 
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G1
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A3 ⟦ G1 (F (pr1 a1b)), G1 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b)))
            · # G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : A3 ⟦ G1 (F (pr1 a1b)),
                  G1 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # G1 (# F (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A1 × B0,
      pr1 β (pr1 F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_pre_whisker A1 A2 A3 F G1 G2 β
           (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pre_whisker
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (make_nat_trans
        (pair_functor_data G1
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G2
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ ab : A2 × B0, pr1 β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
        (λ (ab ab' : A2 × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A2 B0 ab ab'),
         pathsdirprod
           (nat_trans_ax β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G2
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A3 ⟦ G2 (F (pr1 a1b)), G2 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b)))
            · # G2 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (# G2 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : A3 ⟦ G2 (F (pr1 a1b)),
                  G2 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # G2 (# F (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# G2 (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# G2 (# F (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
∏ x : precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G1
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A3 ⟦ G1 (F (pr1 a1b)), G1 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b)))
            · # G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : A3 ⟦ G1 (F (pr1 a1b)),
                  G1 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # G1 (# F (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A1 × B0,
      pr1 β (pr1 F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_pre_whisker A1 A2 A3 F G1 G2 β
           (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)

           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (make_nat_trans
        (pair_functor_data G1
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G2

        (λ ab : A2 × B0, pr1 β (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
        (λ (ab ab' : A2 × B0)

         pathsdirprod
           (nat_trans_ax β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
           (internal_paths_rew_r

        (pair_functor_data G2
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))

        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

                  G2 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # G2 (# F (pr1 fg))

            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)

A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

        (pair_functor_data G1

        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)

      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A3 ⟦ G1 (F (pr1 a1b)), G1 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b)))
            · # G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : A3 ⟦ G1 (F (pr1 a1b)),
                  G1 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # G1 (# F (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# G1 (# F (pr1 fg))))

        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G1)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A1 × B0,
      pr1 β (pr1 F (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_pre_whisker A1 A2 A3 F G1 G2 β

nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

        (pair_functor_data G1
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G2
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

        (λ (ab ab' : A2 × B0)

         pathsdirprod
           (nat_trans_ax β (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G2
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G2)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A3 ⟦ G2 (F (pr1 a1b)), G2 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b)))
            · # G2 (# F (pr1 fg)))

           (λ p : A3 ⟦ G2 (F (pr1 a1b)),
                  G2 (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,

           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b))) · pr1 β (pr1 F (pr1 a1b)))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)) =
make_dirprod
  (pr1 β (F (pr1 a1b)) · id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b))))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b))

    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b))) · pr1 β (pr1 F (pr1 a1b)) =
pr1 β (F (pr1 a1b)) · id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b)))
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) =
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)

    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (G1 (F (pr1 a1b))) · pr1 β (pr1 F (pr1 a1b)) =
pr1 β (F (pr1 a1b)) · id₁ (G2 (F (pr1 a1b)))
 
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
pr1 β (pr1 F (pr1 a1b)) = pr1 β (F (pr1 a1b))

      apply idpath.
    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F: A1 ⟶ A2
G1, G2: A2 ⟶ A3
β: G1 ⟹ G2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) =
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)
 apply idpath.
  
B0: CAT
∏ (a b c : category) (f₁ f₂ : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c)
(η : f₁ ⟹ f₂),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f₁ (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (f₁ ∙ g)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f₁
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f₁ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 a1b)), g (f₁ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 a1b)))
            · # g (# f₁ (pr1 fg)))
           (# g (# f₁ (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g (f₁ (pr1 a1b)),
                  g (f₁ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # g (# f₁ (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (g (f₁ (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# g (# f₁ (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# g (# f₁ (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (f₁ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0,
      # (pr1 g) (pr1 η (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_post_whisker a b c f₁ f₂ η g
           (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f₁ (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data f₂ (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (post_whisker
     (make_nat_trans
        (pair_functor_data f₁
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data f₂
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ ab : a × B0, pr1 η (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
        (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
         pathsdirprod
           (nat_trans_ax η (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
     (pair_functor g (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f₂
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data g
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (f₂ ∙ g)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g (f₂ (pr1 a1b)), g (f₂ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 a1b)))
            · # g (# f₂ (pr1 fg)))
           (# g (# f₂ (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g (f₂ (pr1 a1b)),
                  g (f₂ (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # g (# f₂ (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (g (f₂ (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# g (# f₂ (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# g (# f₂ (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
 
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F1, F2: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
α: F1 ⟹ F2
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F1 ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (pair_functor_data (F2 ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F1
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F1 ∙ G)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (G (F1 (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A3 ⟦ G (F1 (pr1 a1b)), G (F1 (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (G (F1 (pr1 a1b)))
            · # G (# F1 (pr1 fg)))
           (# G (# F1 (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : A3 ⟦ G (F1 (pr1 a1b)),
                  G (F1 (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # G (# F1 (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (G (F1 (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# G (# F1 (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# G (# F1 (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (pair_functor_data (F1 ∙ G)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data (F2 ∙ G)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : A1 × B0,
      # (pr1 G) (pr1 α (pr1 ab)),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (is_nat_trans_post_whisker A1 A2 A3 F1 F2 α G
           (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (pair_functor_data G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (pair_functor_data (F2 ∙ G)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
  (post_whisker
     (make_nat_trans
        (pair_functor_data F1
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data F2
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (λ ab : A1 × B0, pr1 α (pr1 ab),, id₁ (pr2 ab))
        (λ (ab ab' : A1 × B0)
         (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 ab ab'),
         pathsdirprod
           (nat_trans_ax α (pr1 ab) (pr1 ab') (pr1 fg))
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
              (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
               pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
              (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
     (pair_functor G (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data F2
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (pair_functor_data G
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (pair_functor_data (F2 ∙ G)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ a1b : A1 × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (G (F2 (pr1 a1b))))
        (id₁ (pr2 a1b)))
     (λ (a1b a1b' : A1 × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor A1 B0 a1b a1b'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A3 ⟦ G (F2 (pr1 a1b)), G (F2 (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
           (id₁ (G (F2 (pr1 a1b)))
            · # G (# F2 (pr1 fg)))
           (# G (# F2 (pr1 fg)))
           (λ p : A3 ⟦ G (F2 (pr1 a1b)),
                  G (F2 (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
            # G (# F2 (pr1 fg))
            · id₁ (G (F2 (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
           (id_right (# G (# F2 (pr1 fg))))
           (id_left (# G (# F2 (pr1 fg)))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))))

∏ x : precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0,

  (functor_composite_data

            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F1 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data F2 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

α: F1 ⟹ F2

  (functor_composite_data

        (pair_functor_data G

B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F1, F2: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
α: F1 ⟹ F2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (G (F1 (pr1 a1b)))
   · # (pr1 G) (pr1 α (pr1 a1b)))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)) =
make_dirprod
  (# G (pr1 α (pr1 a1b)) · id₁ (G (F2 (pr1 a1b))))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b))

    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F1, F2: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
α: F1 ⟹ F2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (G (F1 (pr1 a1b))) · # (pr1 G) (pr1 α (pr1 a1b)) =
# G (pr1 α (pr1 a1b)) · id₁ (G (F2 (pr1 a1b)))

A1, A2, A3: category
F1, F2: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
α: F1 ⟹ F2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) =
id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b)

a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0

B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F1, F2: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
α: F1 ⟹ F2
a1b: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
# (pr1 G) (pr1 α (pr1 a1b)) = # G (pr1 α (pr1 a1b))

      apply idpath.
    
B0: CAT
A1, A2, A3: category
F1, F2: A1 ⟶ A2
G: A2 ⟶ A3
α: F1 ⟹ F2

id₁ (pr2 a1b) · id₁ (pr2 a1b) =

 apply idpath.

∏ a : category,
∑
φ : pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)
      (functor_identity (pr1 B0))
    ⟹ functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data a B0),

  (functor_identity_data
     (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))
  (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)
     (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

     (functor_identity_data
        (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))
     (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)
        (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
     (λ ab : a × B0,
      make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
     (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
      (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r (a ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
           (λ p : a ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
            pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab') = p)

        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)

           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg))))) φ =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_identity_data
     (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))
× nat_trans_comp
    (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)
       (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))

       (precategory_binproduct_data a B0))

       (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) φ

       (functor_identity_data

       (pair_functor_data (functor_identity a)

       (λ ab : a × B0,
        make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))
       (λ (ab ab' : a × B0)
        (fg : precategory_binproduct_mor a B0 ab ab'),
        pathsdirprod
          (internal_paths_rew_r
             (a ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
             (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg) (pr1 fg)
             (λ p : a ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,

     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data f

        (pair_functor_data g

            · id₁ (g (f (pr1 a1b'))) = p)

        (internal_paths_rew_r

           (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)

            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)

G: A2 ⟶ A3
a1b, a1b': precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0
fg: precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0 ⟦ a1b, a1b' ⟧
make_dirprod
  (# G (# F (pr1 fg)) · id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b'))))
  (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b')) =
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b))) · # G (# F (pr1 fg)))
  (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg)

           apply pathsdirprod; rewrite id_left; apply id_right.

         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (A3 ⟦ G (F (pr1 a1b)), G (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧)
            (id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b)))
             · # G (# F (pr1 fg)))
            (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))
            (λ p : A3 ⟦ G (F (pr1 a1b)),
                   G (F (pr1 a1b')) ⟧,
             # G (# F (pr1 fg))
             · id₁ (G (F (pr1 a1b'))) = p)
            (id_right (# G (# F (pr1 fg))))
            (id_left (# G (# F (pr1 fg)))))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧)
            (id₁ (pr2 a1b) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
            (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 a1b, pr2 a1b' ⟧,
             pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 a1b') = p)
            (id_right (pr2 fg)) (id_left (pr2 fg)))
       :
       # (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
            (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) fg
       · id₁
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
              (pair_functor_data G
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a1b') =
       id₁
         (functor_composite_data
            (pair_functor_data F
               (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
            (pair_functor_data G
               (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a1b)
       · # (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
              (pair_functor_data G
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))) fg)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (pair_functor_data G
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        ((λ a1b : precategory_binproduct_data A1 B0,
          id₁
            (functor_composite_data
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
               (pair_functor_data G
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))) a1b))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (pair_functor_data (F ∙ G)
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
              (pair_functor_data G
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))))))
 split; apply (nat_trans_eq (homset_property (productwithfixedelement _)));
          intro a1b; cbn; apply pathsdirprod; apply id_left.
Defined.

End ProductWithFixedSecondArgument.

Section FunctorCategoryWithFixedSource.

  Context (A0 : ob CAT).

psfunctor_data CAT CAT

psfunctor_data CAT CAT

f ==> g → ?F₁ a b f ==> ?F₁ a b g

∏ a : CAT, id₁ (?F₀ a) ==> ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
A0: CAT
∏ (a b c : CAT) (f : CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : CAT ⟦ b, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b f · ?F₁ b c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

⟶ functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B'

    exact (post_composition_functor A0 B B' F).

a: pr1 A0
α a · id₁ (G' a) = id₁ (G a) · pr1 α a

      rewrite id_left; apply id_right.

∏ (a b c : CAT) (f : CAT ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : CAT ⟦ b, c ⟧),
(λ (B B' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ B, B' ⟧),

 :
 CAT ⟦ (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B,
 (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B' ⟧) a b f
· (λ (B B' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ B, B' ⟧),
   post_composition_functor A0 B B' F
   :
   CAT ⟦ (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B,
   (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B' ⟧) b c g ==>
(λ (B B' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ B, B' ⟧),
 post_composition_functor A0 B B' F
 :
 CAT ⟦ (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B,

H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
(λ (B B' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ B, B' ⟧),
 post_composition_functor A0 B B' F
 :
 CAT ⟦ (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B,
 (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B' ⟧) B1 B2 H
· (λ (B B' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ B, B' ⟧),
   post_composition_functor A0 B B' F
   :
   CAT ⟦ (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B,
   (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B' ⟧) B2 B3 F ==>
(λ (B B' : CAT) (F : CAT ⟦ B, B' ⟧),
 post_composition_functor A0 B B' F
 :
 CAT ⟦ (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B,
 (λ B0 : CAT, [pr1 A0, B0]) B' ⟧) B1 B3 (H · F)

H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
functor_composite_data
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F)
⟹ post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F)

    
A0, B1, B2, B3: CAT
H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F))

is_nat_trans
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F)) 
  ?t

H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧

nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F))

H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B3
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
    (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F) G,
post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F) G ⟧

H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data G H) F
⟹ functor_composite_data G
    (functor_composite_data H F)

      apply α_functors.
    
A0, B1, B2, B3: CAT
H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F))
  ((λ G : functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1,
    α_functors G H F
    :
    functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B3
    ⟦ functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F) G,
    post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F) G ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F)))
 
A0, B1, B2, B3: CAT
H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
G, G': functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
α: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1 ⟦ G, G' ⟧
# (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 H)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F)) α
· α_functors G' H F =
α_functors G H F
· # (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (H ∙ F)) α
 
A0, B1, B2, B3: CAT
H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
G, G': functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
α: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1 ⟦ G, G' ⟧
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data G H)
     F)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data G' H) F)
  (functor_composite_data G'
     (functor_composite_data H F))
  (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3
     (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α H) F)
  (α_functors G' H F) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data G H)
     F)
  (functor_composite_data G
     (functor_composite_data H F))
  (functor_composite_data G'
     (functor_composite_data H F)) (α_functors G H F)
  (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α (H ∙ F))

      
A0, B1, B2, B3: CAT
H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
G, G': functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
α: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1 ⟦ G, G' ⟧
∏ x : pr1 A0,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data G H)
     F)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data G' H) F)
  (functor_composite_data G'
     (functor_composite_data H F))
  (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3
     (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α H) F)
  (α_functors G' H F) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data G H)
     F)
  (functor_composite_data G
     (functor_composite_data H F))
  (functor_composite_data G'
     (functor_composite_data H F)) (α_functors G H F)
  (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α (H ∙ F)) x

      
A0, B1, B2, B3: CAT
H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
G, G': functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
α: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1 ⟦ G, G' ⟧
a: pr1 A0
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data G H)
     F)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data G' H) F)
  (functor_composite_data G'
     (functor_composite_data H F))
  (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3
     (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α H) F)
  (α_functors G' H F) a =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data (functor_composite_data G H)
     F)
  (functor_composite_data G
     (functor_composite_data H F))
  (functor_composite_data G'
     (functor_composite_data H F)) (α_functors G H F)
  (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α (H ∙ F)) a

      
A0, B1, B2, B3: CAT
H: CAT ⟦ B1, B2 ⟧
F: CAT ⟦ B2, B3 ⟧
G, G': functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
α: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1 ⟦ G, G' ⟧
a: pr1 A0
# (pr1 F) (# (pr1 H) (pr1 α a)) · id₁ (F (H (G' a))) =
id₁ (F (H (G a))) · # F (# H (pr1 α a))

      rewrite id_left; apply id_right.
Defined.

psfunctor_laws functorcategoryright_map_data

A0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
   pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id f))
  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G' f f α
       (nat_trans_id f) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G' f f α (nat_trans_id f)) =
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
A0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f g h : a ⟶ b) (η : f ⟹ g)
(φ : g ⟹ h),
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b h)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
   pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ))
  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G' f h α
       (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G' f h α
     (nat_trans_comp f g h η φ)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b g)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b h)
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b g)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, pre_whisker (pr1 G) η)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G' f g α η @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G' f g α η))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b g)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b h)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, pre_whisker (pr1 G) φ)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G' g h α φ @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G' g h α φ))
A0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) a))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
     (functor_identity a ∙ f))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) a))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a a
           (functor_identity a))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (functor_identity a ∙ f))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) a))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a a
              (functor_identity a))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, ρ_functors_inv G)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq a G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data a))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data a)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))
              (nat_trans_comp G
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data a))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data a))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a a α
                    (functor_identity a)))
              (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (a ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a0) · pr1 α a0) (pr1 α a0)
                 (λ p : a ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧,
                  α a0 · id₁ (G' a0) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a0))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a0)))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 a b f))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a a
              (functor_identity a))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
           (functor_identity a ∙ f))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
         α_functors G (functor_identity a) f)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq b
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_identity_data a)) f)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data a) f))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data a)) f)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data a)) f)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data a) f))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a a α
                    (functor_identity a)) f)
              (α_functors G' (functor_identity a) f))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data a)) f)
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data a) f))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data a) f))
              (α_functors G (functor_identity a) f)
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α
                 (functor_identity a ∙ f)))
           (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧)
              (id₁ (f (G a0)) · # f (pr1 α a0))
              (# f (pr1 α a0))
              (λ p : b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧,
               # (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0) · id₁ (f (G' a0)) =
               p) (id_right (# f (pr1 α a0)))
              (id_left (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (functor_identity a ∙ f))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id f))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G'
          (functor_identity a ∙ f) f α
          (nat_trans_id f) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G'
        (functor_identity a ∙ f) f α (nat_trans_id f)))
A0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) b)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
     (f ∙ functor_identity b))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) b)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b b
           (functor_identity b)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (f ∙ functor_identity b))
     (pre_whisker
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) b))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b b
              (functor_identity b))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ b, ρ_functors_inv G)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ b) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq b G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data b)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))
              (nat_trans_comp G
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data b))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data b))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b b α
                    (functor_identity b)))
              (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (b ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a0) · pr1 α a0) (pr1 α a0)
                 (λ p : b ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧,
                  α a0 · id₁ (G' a0) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a0))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a0))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b b
              (functor_identity b)))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
           (f ∙ functor_identity b))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
         α_functors G f (functor_identity b))
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq b
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f)
              (functor_identity_data b))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_identity_data b)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G' f)
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_identity_data b)))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b b
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f)
                 (functor_identity b))
              (α_functors G' f (functor_identity b)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_identity_data b)))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_identity_data b)))
              (α_functors G f (functor_identity b))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α
                 (f ∙ functor_identity b)))
           (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧)
              (id₁ (f (G a0)) · # f (pr1 α a0))
              (# f (pr1 α a0))
              (λ p : b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧,
               # (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0) · id₁ (f (G' a0)) =
               p) (id_right (# f (pr1 α a0)))
              (id_left (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (f ∙ functor_identity b))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id f))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G'
          (f ∙ functor_identity b) f α
          (nat_trans_id f) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G'
        (f ∙ functor_identity b) f α (nat_trans_id f)))
A0: CAT
∏ (a b c d : category) (f : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c)
(h : c ⟶ d),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d ((f ∙ g) ∙ h))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b d (g ∙ h)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
        (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
     (pre_whisker
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b d
              (g ∙ h))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ b, α_functors G g h)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ b) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq d
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G g) h)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G g) h)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' g) h)
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data g h))
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 c d
                    (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c α g)
                    h) (α_functors G' g h))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G g) h)
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_composite_data g h))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data g h))
                 (α_functors G g h)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b d α
                    (g ∙ h)))
              (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (d ⟦ h (g (G a0)), h (g (G' a0)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (h (g (G a0)))
                  · # h (# g (pr1 α a0)))
                 (# h (# g (pr1 α a0)))
                 (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (G a0)),
                        h (g (G' a0)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 h) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 α a0))
                  · id₁ (h (g (G' a0))) = p)
                 (id_right (# h (# g (pr1 α a0))))
                 (id_left (# h (# g (pr1 α a0))))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b d
              (g ∙ h)))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
           (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f (g ∙ h))
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq d
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f)
              (functor_composite_data g h))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_composite_data g h)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G' f)
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_composite_data g h)))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b d
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f)
                 (g ∙ h)) (α_functors G' f (g ∙ h)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_composite_data g h)))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_composite_data g h)))
              (α_functors G f (g ∙ h))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a d α
                 (f ∙ (g ∙ h))))
           (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (d ⟦ h (g (f (G a0))), h (g (f (G' a0)))
               ⟧)
              (id₁ (h (g (f (G a0))))
               · # h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))
              (# h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))
              (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (f (G a0))),
                     h (g (f (G' a0))) ⟧,
               # h (# g (# (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0)))
               · id₁ (h (g (f (G' a0)))) = p)
              (id_right (# h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))))
              (id_left (# h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
        (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
        ((f ∙ g) ∙ h))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G)
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h))))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a d G G' (f ∙ (g ∙ h))
          ((f ∙ g) ∙ h) α
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data f
                (functor_composite_data g h))) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a d G G' (f ∙ (g ∙ h))
        ((f ∙ g) ∙ h) α
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))

∏ (a b c : category) (f₁ f₂ : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c)

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₁ ∙ g))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₂ ∙ g))

     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₁)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₁ ∙ g))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f₁ g)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq c
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G f₁) g)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f₁) g)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' f₁) g)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f₁) g)
           (α_functors G' f₁ g))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f₁) g)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
           (α_functors G f₁ g)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a c α (f₁ ∙ g)))
        (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g (f₁ (G a0)), g (f₁ (G' a0)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g (f₁ (G a0)))
            · # g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0)))
           (# g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g (f₁ (G a0)), g (f₁ (G' a0)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 g) (# (pr1 f₁) (pr1 α a0))
            · id₁ (g (f₁ (G' a0))) = p)
           (id_right (# g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0))))
           (id_left (# g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₁ ∙ g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₂ ∙ g))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (post_whisker η g))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a c G G' (f₁ ∙ g) (f₂ ∙ g)

        (post_whisker η g))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data

  (functor_composite_data

        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, pre_whisker (pr1 G) η)

     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₂)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₂ ∙ g))

           (functor_composite_data f₂ g))

              (functor_composite_data G f₂) g)
           (functor_composite_data

           (functor_composite_data G'

        (λ a0 : pr1 A0,

            · id₁ (g (f₂ (G' a0))) = p)

           (id_left (# g (# f₂ (pr1 α a0)))))))

  
A0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,

  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G' f f α
       (nat_trans_id f) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G' f f α (nat_trans_id f)) =
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)

     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G' g h α φ @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G' g h α φ))
 
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F1, F2, F3: B ⟶ B'
β1: F1 ⟹ F2
β2: F2 ⟹ F3
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
   pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2))
  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
       (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
     (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β1)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F2 α β1 @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F2 α β1))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β2)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2 @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2))

F1, F2, F3: B ⟶ B'
β1: F1 ⟹ F2
β2: F2 ⟹ F3
∏ x : functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B,
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
   pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2))
  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
       (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
     (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2)) x =

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)

     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β2)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2 @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2)) x

    
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F1, F2, F3: B ⟶ B'
β1: F1 ⟹ F2
β2: F2 ⟹ F3
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
   pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2))
  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
       (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
     (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2)) G =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β1)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F2 α β1 @

  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β2)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2 @

A0: CAT
B, B': category
F1, F2, F3: B ⟶ B'
β1: F1 ⟹ F2
β2: F2 ⟹ F3
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
∏ x : pr1 A0,
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
   pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2))
  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
       (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
     (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2)) G x =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β1)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F2 α β1 @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F2 α β1))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β2)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2 @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2)) G x

    
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F1, F2, F3: B ⟶ B'
β1: F1 ⟹ F2
β2: F2 ⟹ F3
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
a: pr1 A0
make_nat_trans
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
   pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2))
  (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
   ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
       (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2) @
   horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F3 α
     (nat_trans_comp F1 F2 F3 β1 β2)) G a =
nat_trans_comp
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β1)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F1 F2 α β1 @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F1 F2 α β1))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F2)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F3)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β2)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2 @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G' F2 F3 α β2)) G a
 apply idpath.
  
A0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) a))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
     (functor_identity a ∙ f))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) a))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a a
           (functor_identity a))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (functor_identity a ∙ f))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) a))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a a
              (functor_identity a))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, ρ_functors_inv G)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq a G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data a))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data a)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))
              (nat_trans_comp G
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data a))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data a))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a a α
                    (functor_identity a)))
              (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (a ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a0) · pr1 α a0) (pr1 α a0)
                 (λ p : a ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧,
                  α a0 · id₁ (G' a0) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a0))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a0)))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 a b f))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a a
              (functor_identity a))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
           (functor_identity a ∙ f))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
         α_functors G (functor_identity a) f)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq b
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_identity_data a)) f)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data a) f))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data a)) f)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data a)) f)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data a) f))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a a α
                    (functor_identity a)) f)
              (α_functors G' (functor_identity a) f))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data a)) f)
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data a) f))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data a) f))
              (α_functors G (functor_identity a) f)
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α
                 (functor_identity a ∙ f)))
           (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧)
              (id₁ (f (G a0)) · # f (pr1 α a0))
              (# f (pr1 α a0))
              (λ p : b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧,
               # (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0) · id₁ (f (G' a0)) =
               p) (id_right (# f (pr1 α a0)))
              (id_left (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (functor_identity a ∙ f))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id f))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G'
          (functor_identity a ∙ f) f α
          (nat_trans_id f) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G'
        (functor_identity a ∙ f) f α (nat_trans_id f)))
 
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F: B ⟶ B'
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
     (functor_identity B ∙ F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
           (functor_identity B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, ρ_functors_inv G)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data B))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))
              (nat_trans_comp G
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B α
                    (functor_identity B)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r (B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a) · pr1 α a) (pr1 α a)
                 (λ p : B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧,
                  α a · id₁ (G' a) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a)))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 B B' F))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
           (functor_identity B ∙ F))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
         α_functors G (functor_identity B) F)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq B'
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_identity_data B)) F)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data B) F))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B'
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B α
                    (functor_identity B)) F)
              (α_functors G' (functor_identity B) F))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (α_functors G (functor_identity B) F)
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B' α
                 (functor_identity B ∙ F)))
           (λ a : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (G a)) · # F (pr1 α a))
              (# F (pr1 α a))
              (λ p : B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧,
               # (pr1 F) (pr1 α a) · id₁ (F (G' a)) =
               p) (id_right (# F (pr1 α a)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 α a)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id F))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G'
          (functor_identity B ∙ F) F α
          (nat_trans_id F) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F) F α (nat_trans_id F)))

    
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F: B ⟶ B'
∏ x : functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B,
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
  x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
     (functor_identity B ∙ F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
           (functor_identity B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, ρ_functors_inv G)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data B))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))
              (nat_trans_comp G
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B α
                    (functor_identity B)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r (B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a) · pr1 α a) (pr1 α a)
                 (λ p : B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧,
                  α a · id₁ (G' a) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a)))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 B B' F))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
           (functor_identity B ∙ F))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
         α_functors G (functor_identity B) F)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq B'
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_identity_data B)) F)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data B) F))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B'
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B α
                    (functor_identity B)) F)
              (α_functors G' (functor_identity B) F))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (α_functors G (functor_identity B) F)
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B' α
                 (functor_identity B ∙ F)))
           (λ a : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (G a)) · # F (pr1 α a))
              (# F (pr1 α a))
              (λ p : B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧,
               # (pr1 F) (pr1 α a) · id₁ (F (G' a)) =
               p) (id_right (# F (pr1 α a)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 α a)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id F))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G'
          (functor_identity B ∙ F) F α
          (nat_trans_id F) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F) F α (nat_trans_id F)))
  x

    
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F: B ⟶ B'
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
  G =
