  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
     (functor_identity B ∙ F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)

     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
           (functor_identity B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F))

        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, ρ_functors_inv G)

            nat_trans_eq B G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data B))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))

                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B α
                    (functor_identity B)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r (B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a) · pr1 α a) (pr1 α a)
                 (λ p : B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧,
                  α a · id₁ (G' a) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a)))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 B B' F))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
           (functor_identity B ∙ F))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
         α_functors G (functor_identity B) F)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq B'
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_identity_data B)) F)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_identity_data B) F))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B'
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B α
                    (functor_identity B)) F)
              (α_functors G' (functor_identity B) F))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))

                 (functor_identity B ∙ F)))
           (λ a : pr1 A0,

                 (id_left (pr1 α a)))))

        (functor_composite_data

        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'

                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)

                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B'

                    (functor_identity_data B)) F)

                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))

                    (functor_identity_data B) F))

nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
  G a =

  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
     (functor_identity B ∙ F))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)

     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))

        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
           (functor_identity B))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (functor_identity B ∙ F))

        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, ρ_functors_inv G)

                    (functor_identity_data B)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))

                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B α
                    (functor_identity B)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r (B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a) · pr1 α a) (pr1 α a)
                 (λ p : B ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧,

                 (id_left (pr1 α a)))))

        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B
              (functor_identity B))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
           (functor_identity B ∙ F))

                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_identity_data B) F))
              (α_functors G (functor_identity B) F)

                 (functor_identity B ∙ F)))

A0: CAT
B, B': category
F: B ⟶ B'
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
a: pr1 A0
id₁ (F (G a)) =
# (pr1 F) (id₁ (G a)) · id₁ (F (G a))
· id₁ (F ((pr11 G) a))

    do 2 rewrite id_right; apply pathsinv0, functor_id.
  
A0: CAT
∏ (a b : category) (f : a ⟶ b),
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) b)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
     (f ∙ functor_identity b))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) b)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b b
           (functor_identity b)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (f ∙ functor_identity b))
     (pre_whisker
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) b))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b b
              (functor_identity b))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ b, ρ_functors_inv G)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ b) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq b G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data b)) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))
              (nat_trans_comp G
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data b))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data b))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b b α
                    (functor_identity b)))
              (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (b ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a0) · pr1 α a0) (pr1 α a0)
                 (λ p : b ⟦ G a0, G' a0 ⟧,
                  α a0 · id₁ (G' a0) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a0))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a0))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b b
              (functor_identity b)))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
           (f ∙ functor_identity b))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
         α_functors G f (functor_identity b))
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq b
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f)
              (functor_identity_data b))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_identity_data b)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G' f)
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_identity_data b)))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b b
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f)
                 (functor_identity b))
              (α_functors G' f (functor_identity b)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_identity_data b))
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_identity_data b)))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_identity_data b)))
              (α_functors G f (functor_identity b))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α
                 (f ∙ functor_identity b)))
           (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧)
              (id₁ (f (G a0)) · # f (pr1 α a0))
              (# f (pr1 α a0))
              (λ p : b ⟦ f (G a0), f (G' a0) ⟧,
               # (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0) · id₁ (f (G' a0)) =
               p) (id_right (# f (pr1 α a0)))
              (id_left (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b
        (f ∙ functor_identity b))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id f))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G'
          (f ∙ functor_identity b) f α
          (nat_trans_id f) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G'
        (f ∙ functor_identity b) f α (nat_trans_id f)))
 
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F: B ⟶ B'
nat_trans_id (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
     (functor_identity_data
        (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B')))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
     (F ∙ functor_identity B'))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
        (functor_identity_data
           (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B')))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B' B'
           (functor_identity B')))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (F ∙ functor_identity B'))
     (pre_whisker
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_identity_data
              (functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B'))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B' B'
              (functor_identity B'))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B', ρ_functors_inv G)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B') (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B' G
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_identity_data B'))
              (nat_trans_comp G G'
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B')) α
                 (ρ_functors_inv G'))
              (nat_trans_comp G
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_identity_data B'))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_identity_data B'))
                 (ρ_functors_inv G)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B' B' α
                    (functor_identity B')))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r (B' ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G a) · pr1 α a) (pr1 α a)
                 (λ p : B' ⟦ G a, G' a ⟧,
                  α a · id₁ (G' a) = p)
                 (id_right (pr1 α a))
                 (id_left (pr1 α a))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B' B'
              (functor_identity B')))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
           (F ∙ functor_identity B'))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
         α_functors G F (functor_identity B'))
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq B'
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F)
              (functor_identity_data B'))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F
                 (functor_identity_data B')))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F)
                 (functor_identity_data B'))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G' F)
                 (functor_identity_data B'))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F
                    (functor_identity_data B')))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B' B'
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B' α F)
                 (functor_identity B'))
              (α_functors G' F (functor_identity B')))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F)
                 (functor_identity_data B'))
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data F
                    (functor_identity_data B')))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F
                    (functor_identity_data B')))
              (α_functors G F (functor_identity B'))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B B' α
                 (F ∙ functor_identity B')))
           (λ a : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (G a)) · # F (pr1 α a))
              (# F (pr1 α a))
              (λ p : B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧,
               # (pr1 F) (pr1 α a) · id₁ (F (G' a)) =
               p) (id_right (# F (pr1 α a)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 α a)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (F ∙ functor_identity B'))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id F))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G'
          (F ∙ functor_identity B') F α
          (nat_trans_id F) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G'
        (F ∙ functor_identity B') F α (nat_trans_id F)))

           (λ a : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧)
              (id₁ (F (G a)) · # F (pr1 α a))
              (# F (pr1 α a))
              (λ p : B' ⟦ F (G a), F (G' a) ⟧,
               # (pr1 F) (pr1 α a) · id₁ (F (G' a)) =
               p) (id_right (# F (pr1 α a)))
              (id_left (# F (pr1 α a)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B'
        (F ∙ functor_identity B'))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B B' F)
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (nat_trans_id F))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B B' G G'
          (F ∙ functor_identity B') F α
          (nat_trans_id F) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B B' G G'
        (F ∙ functor_identity B') F α (nat_trans_id F)))
  G a

    
A0: CAT
B, B': category
F: B ⟶ B'
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
a: pr1 A0
id₁ (F (G a)) =
id₁ (F (G a)) · id₁ (F (G a)) · id₁ (F ((pr11 G) a))

    do 2 rewrite id_right; apply idpath.
  
A0: CAT
∏ (a b c d : category) (f : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c)
(h : c ⟶ d),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d ((f ∙ g) ∙ h))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b d (g ∙ h)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
        (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
     (pre_whisker
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b d
              (g ∙ h))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ b, α_functors G g h)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ b) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq d
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G g) h)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G g) h)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' g) h)
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data g h))
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 c d
                    (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c α g)
                    h) (α_functors G' g h))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G g) h)
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_composite_data g h))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data g h))
                 (α_functors G g h)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b d α
                    (g ∙ h)))
              (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (d ⟦ h (g (G a0)), h (g (G' a0)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (h (g (G a0)))
                  · # h (# g (pr1 α a0)))
                 (# h (# g (pr1 α a0)))
                 (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (G a0)),
                        h (g (G' a0)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 h) (# (pr1 g) (pr1 α a0))
                  · id₁ (h (g (G' a0))) = p)
                 (id_right (# h (# g (pr1 α a0))))
                 (id_left (# h (# g (pr1 α a0))))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b d
              (g ∙ h)))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
           (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f (g ∙ h))
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq d
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f)
              (functor_composite_data g h))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f
                 (functor_composite_data g h)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G' f)
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_composite_data g h)))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b d
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f)
                 (g ∙ h)) (α_functors G' f (g ∙ h)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f)
                 (functor_composite_data g h))
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_composite_data g h)))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f
                    (functor_composite_data g h)))
              (α_functors G f (g ∙ h))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a d α
                 (f ∙ (g ∙ h))))

              (id₁ (h (g (f (G a0))))
               · # h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))
              (# h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))
              (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (f (G a0))),
                     h (g (f (G' a0))) ⟧,
               # h (# g (# (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0)))
               · id₁ (h (g (f (G' a0)))) = p)

              (id_left (# h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
        (f ∙ (g ∙ h)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
        ((f ∙ g) ∙ h))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,

        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data f
              (functor_composite_data g h))))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),

              (functor_composite_data g h))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d ((f ∙ g) ∙ h))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c
              (f ∙ g))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f g)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq c
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G f) g)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data f g))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G f) g)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' f) g)
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data f g))
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c
                    (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f)
                    g) (α_functors G' f g))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G f) g)
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_composite_data f g))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data f g))
                 (α_functors G f g)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a c α
                    (f ∙ g)))
              (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (c ⟦ g (f (G a0)), g (f (G' a0)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (g (f (G a0)))
                  · # g (# f (pr1 α a0)))
                 (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))
                 (λ p : c ⟦ g (f (G a0)),
                        g (f (G' a0)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 g) (# (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0))
                  · id₁ (g (f (G' a0))) = p)
                 (id_right (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))
                 (id_left (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 c d h)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 c d h))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a d
        ((f ∙ g) ∙ h))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G (f ∙ g) h)

        (functor_composite_data

                 (functor_composite_data f g)) h)

              h) (α_functors G' (f ∙ g) h))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data f g)) h)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data f g) h))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data f g) h))
           (α_functors G (f ∙ g) h)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a d α
              ((f ∙ g) ∙ h)))
        (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (d ⟦ h (g (f (G a0))), h (g (f (G' a0))) ⟧)
           (id₁ (h (g (f (G a0))))

           (λ p : d ⟦ h (g (f (G a0))),
                  h (g (f (G' a0))) ⟧,
            # (pr1 h) (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))
            · id₁ (h (g (f (G' a0)))) = p)
           (id_right (# h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))))
           (id_left (# h (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))))))
 
A0: CAT
B1, B2, B3, B4: category
F1: B1 ⟶ B2
F2: B2 ⟶ B3
F3: B3 ⟶ B4
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B4
           (F2 ∙ F3)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
     (pre_whisker
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4
                 F3))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B4
              (F2 ∙ F3))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B2, α_functors G F2 F3)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B2) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B4
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F2) F3)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F2) F3)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' F2) F3)
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B3 B4
                    (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3 α
                       F2) F3) (α_functors G' F2 F3))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F2) F3)
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
                 (α_functors G F2 F3)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B4 α
                    (F2 ∙ F3)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (G a)), F3 (F2 (G' a)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F3 (F2 (G a)))
                  · # F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
                 (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
                 (λ p : B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (G a)),
                        F3 (F2 (G' a)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 F3) (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 α a))
                  · id₁ (F3 (F2 (G' a))) = p)
                 (id_right (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a))))
                 (id_left (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a))))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B4
              (F2 ∙ F3)))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
           (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G F1 (F2 ∙ F3))
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq B4
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F1)
              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F1
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F1)
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G' F1)
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B4
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α F1)
                 (F2 ∙ F3))
              (α_functors G' F1 (F2 ∙ F3)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F1)
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data F1
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (α_functors G F1 (F2 ∙ F3))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B4 α
                 (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3))))
           (λ a : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))),
               F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a))) ⟧)
              (id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))))
               · # F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
              (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
              (λ p : B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))),
                     F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a))) ⟧,
               # F3 (# F2 (# (pr1 F1) (pr1 α a)))
               · id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a)))) = p)
              (id_right (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))
              (id_left (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G)
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F1
              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B1 B4 G G'
          (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)) ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3) α
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data F1
                (functor_composite_data F2 F3))) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B1 B4 G G' (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3))
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3) α
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F1
              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F1 ∙ F2))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
           (F1 ∙ F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4
                 F3))))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2
                 F1)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
              (F1 ∙ F2))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G F1 F2)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B3
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3
                    (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α
                       F1) F2) (α_functors G' F1 F2))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (α_functors G F1 F2)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α
                    (F1 ∙ F2)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B3 ⟦ F2 (F1 (G a)), F2 (F1 (G' a)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F2 (F1 (G a)))
                  · # F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
                 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
                 (λ p : B3 ⟦ F2 (F1 (G a)),
                        F2 (F1 (G' a)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 F2) (# (pr1 F1) (pr1 α a))
                  · id₁ (F2 (F1 (G' a))) = p)
                 (id_right (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
                 (id_left (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
           (F1 ∙ F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))

              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α
                 (F1 ∙ F2)) F3)
           (α_functors G' (F1 ∙ F2) F3))
        (nat_trans_comp

        (functor_composite_data

              (α_functors G F1 (F2 ∙ F3))

           (λ a : pr1 A0,

              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))) x =

  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)

        (make_nat_trans

              (λ a : pr1 A0,

B1, B2, B3, B4: category

  (functor_composite_data

              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B1 B4 G G'
          (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)) ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3) α
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data F1
                (functor_composite_data F2 F3))) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B1 B4 G G' (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3))
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3) α
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F1
              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))) G =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F1 ∙ F2))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))

           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))

           (F1 ∙ F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4
                 F3))))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2
                 F1)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
              (F1 ∙ F2))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G F1 F2)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B3
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3

                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)

                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (α_functors G F1 F2)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α
                    (F1 ∙ F2)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B3 ⟦ F2 (F1 (G a)), F2 (F1 (G' a)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F2 (F1 (G a)))
                  · # F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
                 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
                 (λ p : B3 ⟦ F2 (F1 (G a)),
                        F2 (F1 (G' a)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 F2) (# (pr1 F1) (pr1 α a))
                  · id₁ (F2 (F1 (G' a))) = p)
                 (id_right (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
                 (id_left (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
           (F1 ∙ F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4

              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α
                 (F1 ∙ F2)) F3)
           (α_functors G' (F1 ∙ F2) F3))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2)) F3)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2) F3))
           (functor_composite_data G'

           (α_functors G (F1 ∙ F2) F3)

            · id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a)))) = p)

           (id_left (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))))))
  G

B1, B2, B3, B4: category

  (functor_composite_data

                    (F2 ∙ F3)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,

                 (id₁ (F3 (F2 (G a)))

                 (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a)))

                  # (pr1 F3) (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 α a))
                  · id₁ (F3 (F2 (G' a))) = p)
                 (id_right (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a))))
                 (id_left (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a))))))))

        (functor_composite_data

              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
           (functor_composite_data G'

                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (functor_composite_data G

                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (functor_composite_data G'

                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (α_functors G F1 (F2 ∙ F3))

              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))) G x =

  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))

     (functor_composite_data

           (F1 ∙ F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))

        (functor_composite_data

              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4
                 F3))))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans

              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2))

A0: CAT
B1, B2, B3, B4: category
F1: B1 ⟶ B2
F2: B2 ⟶ B3
F3: B3 ⟶ B4

a: pr1 A0
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data

           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)

           (F2 ∙ F3)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
     (pre_whisker
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4
                 F3))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B4
              (F2 ∙ F3))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B2, α_functors G F2 F3)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B2) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B4
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F2) F3)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))

                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F2) F3)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' F2) F3)
                 (functor_composite_data G'

                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B4 α
                    (F2 ∙ F3)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (G a)), F3 (F2 (G' a)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F3 (F2 (G a)))
                  · # F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
                 (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
                 (λ p : B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (G a)),
                        F3 (F2 (G' a)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 F3) (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 α a))
                  · id₁ (F3 (F2 (G' a))) = p)
                 (id_right (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a))))
                 (id_left (# F3 (# F2 (pr1 α a))))))))
     (make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B4
              (F2 ∙ F3)))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
           (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G F1 (F2 ∙ F3))
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         nat_trans_eq B4
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F1)
              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F1
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F1)
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G' F1)
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B4
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α F1)
                 (F2 ∙ F3))
              (α_functors G' F1 (F2 ∙ F3)))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F1)
                 (functor_composite_data F2 F3))
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data F1
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1
                    (functor_composite_data F2 F3)))
              (α_functors G F1 (F2 ∙ F3))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B4 α
                 (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3))))
           (λ a : pr1 A0,
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))),
               F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a))) ⟧)
              (id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))))
               · # F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
              (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
              (λ p : B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))),
                     F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a))) ⟧,
               # F3 (# F2 (# (pr1 F1) (pr1 α a)))
               · id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a)))) = p)
              (id_right (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))
              (id_left (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G)
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F1
              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B1 B4 G G'
          (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3)) ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3) α
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data F1
                (functor_composite_data F2 F3))) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B1 B4 G G' (F1 ∙ (F2 ∙ F3))
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3) α
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data F1
              (functor_composite_data F2 F3))))) G a =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F1 ∙ F2))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
     ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
  (nat_trans_comp
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
           (F1 ∙ F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F1)
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4
                 F3))))
     (post_whisker
        (make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2
                 F1)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 F2))
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
              (F1 ∙ F2))
           (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G F1 F2)
           (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
            nat_trans_eq B3
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G' F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3
                    (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α
                       F1) F2) (α_functors G' F1 F2))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_composite_data G F1) F2)
                 (functor_composite_data G
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (functor_composite_data G'
                    (functor_composite_data F1 F2))
                 (α_functors G F1 F2)
                 (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α
                    (F1 ∙ F2)))
              (λ a : pr1 A0,
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B3 ⟦ F2 (F1 (G a)), F2 (F1 (G' a)) ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F2 (F1 (G a)))
                  · # F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
                 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
                 (λ p : B3 ⟦ F2 (F1 (G a)),
                        F2 (F1 (G' a)) ⟧,
                  # (pr1 F2) (# (pr1 F1) (pr1 α a))
                  · id₁ (F2 (F1 (G' a))) = p)
                 (id_right (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
                 (id_left (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))))
        (post_composition_functor A0 B3 B4 F3)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
           (F1 ∙ F2))
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B3 B4 F3))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B4
        ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G (F1 ∙ F2) F3)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq B4
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data F1 F2)) F3)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data F1 F2) F3))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2)) F3)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G'
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2)) F3)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2) F3))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B3 B4
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α
                 (F1 ∙ F2)) F3)
           (α_functors G' (F1 ∙ F2) F3))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2)) F3)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2) F3))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data F1 F2) F3))
           (α_functors G (F1 ∙ F2) F3)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B4 α
              ((F1 ∙ F2) ∙ F3)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))),
            F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a))) ⟧)
           (id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))))
            · # F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
           (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
           (λ p : B4 ⟦ F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))),
                  F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a))) ⟧,
            # (pr1 F3) (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
            · id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G' a)))) = p)
           (id_right (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))
           (id_left (# F3 (# F2 (# F1 (pr1 α a))))))))
  G a

    
A0: CAT
B1, B2, B3, B4: category
F1: B1 ⟶ B2
F2: B2 ⟶ B3
F3: B3 ⟶ B4
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
a: pr1 A0
id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a)))) · id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))))
· id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 ((pr11 G) a)))) =
id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))))
· # (pr1 F3) (id₁ (F2 (F1 (G a))))
· id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))))
 
A0: CAT
B1, B2, B3, B4: category
F1: B1 ⟶ B2
F2: B2 ⟶ B3
F3: B3 ⟶ B4
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
a: pr1 A0
id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 ((pr11 G) a)))) =
# (pr1 F3) (id₁ (F2 (F1 (G a))))
· id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 (G a))))
 
A0: CAT
B1, B2, B3, B4: category
F1: B1 ⟶ B2
F2: B2 ⟶ B3
F3: B3 ⟶ B4
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1
a: pr1 A0
id₁ (F3 (F2 (F1 ((pr11 G) a)))) =
# (pr1 F3) (id₁ (F2 (F1 (G a))))
 apply pathsinv0, functor_id.
  
A0: CAT
∏ (a b c : category) (f : a ⟶ b) (g₁ g₂ : b ⟶ c)
(η : g₁ ⟹ g₂),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g₁))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g₁))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g₂))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g₁))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g₁))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f g₁)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq c
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G f) g₁)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data f g₁))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f) g₁)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' f) g₁)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f g₁))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f) g₁)
           (α_functors G' f g₁))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f) g₁)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data f g₁))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f g₁))
           (α_functors G f g₁)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a c α (f ∙ g₁)))
        (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g₁ (f (G a0)), g₁ (f (G' a0)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g₁ (f (G a0)))
            · # g₁ (# f (pr1 α a0)))
           (# g₁ (# f (pr1 α a0)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g₁ (f (G a0)), g₁ (f (G' a0)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 g₁) (# (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0))
            · id₁ (g₁ (f (G' a0))) = p)
           (id_right (# g₁ (# f (pr1 α a0))))
           (id_left (# g₁ (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g₁))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g₂))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (pre_whisker f η))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a c G G' (f ∙ g₁) (f ∙ g₂)
          α (pre_whisker f η) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a c G G' (f ∙ g₁) (f ∙ g₂) α
        (pre_whisker f η))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g₁))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g₂))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g₂))
  (pre_whisker
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
     (make_nat_trans
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g₁)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g₂)
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ b, pre_whisker (pr1 G) η)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ b) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         ! horcomp_post_pre A0 b c G G' g₁ g₂ α η @
         horcomp_pre_post A0 b c G G' g₁ g₂ α η)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g₂))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g₂))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f g₂)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq c
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G f) g₂)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data f g₂))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f) g₂)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' f) g₂)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f g₂))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f) g₂)
           (α_functors G' f g₂))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f) g₂)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data f g₂))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f g₂))
           (α_functors G f g₂)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a c α (f ∙ g₂)))
        (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g₂ (f (G a0)), g₂ (f (G' a0)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g₂ (f (G a0)))
            · # g₂ (# f (pr1 α a0)))
           (# g₂ (# f (pr1 α a0)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g₂ (f (G a0)), g₂ (f (G' a0)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 g₂) (# (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0))
            · id₁ (g₂ (f (G' a0))) = p)
           (id_right (# g₂ (# f (pr1 α a0))))
           (id_left (# g₂ (# f (pr1 α a0)))))))
 
A0: CAT
B, C, D: category
F: B ⟶ C
H1, H2: C ⟶ D
γ: H1 ⟹ H2
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H1))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F ∙ H1))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F ∙ H2))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H1))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F ∙ H1))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, α_functors G F H1)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq D
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G F) H1)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data F H1))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F) H1)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' F) H1)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F H1))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 C D
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B C α F) H1)
           (α_functors G' F H1))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F) H1)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data F H1))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F H1))
           (α_functors G F H1)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B D α (F ∙ H1)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (D ⟦ H1 (F (G a)), H1 (F (G' a)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (H1 (F (G a))) · # H1 (# F (pr1 α a)))
           (# H1 (# F (pr1 α a)))
           (λ p : D ⟦ H1 (F (G a)), H1 (F (G' a)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 H1) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a))
            · id₁ (H1 (F (G' a))) = p)
           (id_right (# H1 (# F (pr1 α a))))
           (id_left (# H1 (# F (pr1 α a)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F ∙ H1))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F ∙ H2))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (pre_whisker F γ))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B D G G' (F ∙ H1) (F ∙ H2)
          α (pre_whisker F γ) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B D G G' (F ∙ H1) (F ∙ H2) α
        (pre_whisker F γ))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H1))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H2))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F ∙ H2))
  (pre_whisker

        (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H1)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H2)
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ C, pre_whisker (pr1 G) γ)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ C) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         ! horcomp_post_pre A0 C D G G' H1 H2 α γ @
         horcomp_pre_post A0 C D G G' H1 H2 α γ)))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H2))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F ∙ H2))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, α_functors G F H2)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq D
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G F) H2)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data F H2))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F) H2)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' F) H2)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F H2))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 C D

        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F) H2)

           (α_functors G F H2)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B D α (F ∙ H2)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,

           (D ⟦ H2 (F (G a)), H2 (F (G' a)) ⟧)

            · id₁ (H2 (F (G' a))) = p)

           (id_left (# H2 (# F (pr1 α a)))))))

           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data F H2))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F H2))
           (α_functors G F H2)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B D α (F ∙ H2)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (D ⟦ H2 (F (G a)), H2 (F (G' a)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (H2 (F (G a))) · # H2 (# F (pr1 α a)))
           (# H2 (# F (pr1 α a)))
           (λ p : D ⟦ H2 (F (G a)), H2 (F (G' a)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 H2) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a))
            · id₁ (H2 (F (G' a))) = p)
           (id_right (# H2 (# F (pr1 α a))))
           (id_left (# H2 (# F (pr1 α a))))))) G a

    
A0: CAT
B, C, D: category
F: B ⟶ C
H1, H2: C ⟶ D
γ: H1 ⟹ H2
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
a: pr1 A0
id₁ (H1 (F (G a))) · pr1 γ (pr1 F ((pr11 G) a)) =
pr1 γ (F (G a)) · id₁ (H2 (F (G a)))
 rewrite id_right; apply id_left.
  
A0: CAT
∏ (a b c : category) (f₁ f₂ : a ⟶ b) (g : b ⟶ c)
(η : f₁ ⟹ f₂),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₁)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₁ ∙ g))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₂ ∙ g))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₁)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₁ ∙ g))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f₁ g)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq c
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G f₁) g)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f₁) g)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' f₁) g)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f₁) g)
           (α_functors G' f₁ g))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f₁) g)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f₁ g))
           (α_functors G f₁ g)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a c α (f₁ ∙ g)))
        (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g (f₁ (G a0)), g (f₁ (G' a0)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g (f₁ (G a0)))
            · # g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0)))
           (# g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g (f₁ (G a0)), g (f₁ (G' a0)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 g) (# (pr1 f₁) (pr1 α a0))
            · id₁ (g (f₁ (G' a0))) = p)
           (id_right (# g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0))))
           (id_left (# g (# f₁ (pr1 α a0)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₁ ∙ g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₂ ∙ g))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (post_whisker η g))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a c G G' (f₁ ∙ g) (f₂ ∙ g)
          α (post_whisker η g) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 a c G G' (f₁ ∙ g) (f₂ ∙ g) α
        (post_whisker η g))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₁)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₂)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₂ ∙ g))
  (post_whisker
     (make_nat_trans
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₁)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₂)
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, pre_whisker (pr1 G) η)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         ! horcomp_post_pre A0 a b G G' f₁ f₂ α η @
         horcomp_pre_post A0 a b G G' f₁ f₂ α η))
     (post_composition_functor A0 b c g))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 a b f₂)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 b c g))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f₂ ∙ g))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ a, α_functors G f₂ g)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ a) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq c
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G f₂) g)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data f₂ g))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f₂) g)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' f₂) g)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f₂ g))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 b c
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a b α f₂) g)
           (α_functors G' f₂ g))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G f₂) g)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data f₂ g))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data f₂ g))
           (α_functors G f₂ g)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a c α (f₂ ∙ g)))
        (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (c ⟦ g (f₂ (G a0)), g (f₂ (G' a0)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (g (f₂ (G a0)))
            · # g (# f₂ (pr1 α a0)))
           (# g (# f₂ (pr1 α a0)))
           (λ p : c ⟦ g (f₂ (G a0)), g (f₂ (G' a0)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 g) (# (pr1 f₂) (pr1 α a0))
            · id₁ (g (f₂ (G' a0))) = p)
           (id_right (# g (# f₂ (pr1 α a0))))
           (id_left (# g (# f₂ (pr1 α a0)))))))
 
A0: CAT
B, C, D: category
F1, F2: B ⟶ C
H: C ⟶ D
β: F1 ⟹ F2
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, α_functors G F1 H)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq D
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G F1) H)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data F1 H))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F1) H)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' F1) H)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F1 H))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 C D
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B C α F1) H)
           (α_functors G' F1 H))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F1) H)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data F1 H))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F1 H))
           (α_functors G F1 H)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B D α (F1 ∙ H)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (D ⟦ H (F1 (G a)), H (F1 (G' a)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (H (F1 (G a))) · # H (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
           (# H (# F1 (pr1 α a)))
           (λ p : D ⟦ H (F1 (G a)), H (F1 (G' a)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F1) (pr1 α a))
            · id₁ (H (F1 (G' a))) = p)
           (id_right (# H (# F1 (pr1 α a))))
           (id_left (# H (# F1 (pr1 α a)))))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (post_whisker β H))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B D G G' (F1 ∙ H) (F2 ∙ H)
          α (post_whisker β H) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B D G G' (F1 ∙ H) (F2 ∙ H) α
        (post_whisker β H))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
  (post_whisker
     (make_nat_trans
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
         ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B C G G' F1 F2 α β @
         horcomp_pre_post A0 B C G G' F1 F2 α β))
     (post_composition_functor A0 C D H))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, α_functors G F2 H)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq D
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G F2) H)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data F2 H))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F2) H)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' F2) H)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F2 H))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 C D
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B C α F2) H)
           (α_functors G' F2 H))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F2) H)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data F2 H))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F2 H))
           (α_functors G F2 H)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B D α (F2 ∙ H)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (D ⟦ H (F2 (G a)), H (F2 (G' a)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (H (F2 (G a))) · # H (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
           (# H (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
           (λ p : D ⟦ H (F2 (G a)), H (F2 (G' a)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 α a))
            · id₁ (H (F2 (G' a))) = p)
           (id_right (# H (# F2 (pr1 α a))))
           (id_left (# H (# F2 (pr1 α a)))))))

B, C, D: category
F1, F2: B ⟶ C
H: C ⟶ D
β: F1 ⟹ F2

nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))

  (make_nat_trans

     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))

           (functor_composite_data G'

              (functor_composite_data G F1) H)

              (functor_composite_data F1 H))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F1 H))
           (α_functors G F1 H)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B D α (F1 ∙ H)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r

           (id₁ (H (F1 (G a))) · # H (# F1 (pr1 α a)))

  (make_nat_trans
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,
      pre_whisker (pr1 G) (post_whisker β H))
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B D G G' (F1 ∙ H) (F2 ∙ H)
          α (post_whisker β H) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B D G G' (F1 ∙ H) (F2 ∙ H) α
        (post_whisker β H))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
  (post_whisker
     (make_nat_trans
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),

     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))

           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F2 H))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 C D

           (α_functors G' F2 H))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F2) H)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data F2 H))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F2 H))
           (α_functors G F2 H)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B D α (F2 ∙ H)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (D ⟦ H (F2 (G a)), H (F2 (G' a)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (H (F2 (G a))) · # H (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
           (# H (# F2 (pr1 α a)))
           (λ p : D ⟦ H (F2 (G a)), H (F2 (G' a)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F2) (pr1 α a))
            · id₁ (H (F2 (G' a))) = p)
           (id_right (# H (# F2 (pr1 α a))))
           (id_left (# H (# F2 (pr1 α a))))))) x

    
A0: CAT
B, C, D: category
F1, F2: B ⟶ C
H: C ⟶ D
β: F1 ⟹ F2
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)

     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F1 ∙ H))

           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 C D

        (λ a : pr1 A0,

           (id₁ (H (F1 (G a))) · # H (# F1 (pr1 α a)))

     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B,

     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      ! horcomp_post_pre A0 B D G G' (F1 ∙ H) (F2 ∙ H)
          α (post_whisker β H) @
      horcomp_pre_post A0 B D G G' (F1 ∙ H) (F2 ∙ H) α
        (post_whisker β H))) G =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 C D H))
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)

  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))
  (post_whisker
     (make_nat_trans
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F1)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B C F2)
        (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B, pre_whisker (pr1 G) β)
        (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B) (α : G ⟹ G'),

  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data

     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B D (F2 ∙ H))

B, C, D: category
F1, F2: B ⟶ C
H: C ⟶ D
β: F1 ⟹ F2
G: functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B
a: pr1 A0
id₁ (H (F1 (G a))) · # (pr1 H) (pr1 β ((pr11 G) a)) =
# (pr1 H) (pr1 β ((pr11 G) a)) · id₁ (H (F2 (G a)))
 rewrite id_right; apply id_left.
Defined.

             (α_functors G' f g))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data G f) g)
             (functor_composite_data G
                (functor_composite_data f g))
             (functor_composite_data G'
                (functor_composite_data f g))
             (α_functors G f g)
             (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 a c α (f ∙ g)))
          (λ a0 : pr1 A0,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (c ⟦ g (f (G a0)), g (f (G' a0)) ⟧)
             (id₁ (g (f (G a0)))
              · # g (# f (pr1 α a0)))
             (# g (# f (pr1 α a0)))
             (λ p : c ⟦ g (f (G a0)), g (f (G' a0)) ⟧,
              # (pr1 g) (# (pr1 f) (pr1 α a0))
              · id₁ (g (f (G' a0))) = p)
             (id_right (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))
             (id_left (# g (# f (pr1 α a0))))))) =
  nat_trans_id
    (post_composition_functor_data A0 a c (f ∙ g))
 
A0: CAT
B1, B2, B3: category
F: B1 ⟶ B2
H: B2 ⟶ B3
∑
φ : post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F ∙ H)
    ⟹ functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H),
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H))
  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F ∙ H))
