     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H))
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F ∙ H))
     (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G F H)
     (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
      nat_trans_eq B3
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data G F) H)
        (functor_composite_data G'
           (functor_composite_data F H))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F) H)
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G' F) H)
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F H))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3
              (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α F) H)
           (α_functors G' F H))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data G F) H)
           (functor_composite_data G
              (functor_composite_data F H))
           (functor_composite_data G'
              (functor_composite_data F H))
           (α_functors G F H)
           (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α (F ∙ H)))
        (λ a : pr1 A0,
         internal_paths_rew_r
           (B3 ⟦ H (F (G a)), H (F (G' a)) ⟧)
           (id₁ (H (F (G a))) · # H (# F (pr1 α a)))
           (# H (# F (pr1 α a)))
           (λ p : B3 ⟦ H (F (G a)), H (F (G' a)) ⟧,
            # (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a))
            · id₁ (H (F (G' a))) = p)
           (id_right (# H (# F (pr1 α a))))
           (id_left (# H (# F (pr1 α a))))))) φ =
nat_trans_id
  (functor_composite_data
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
     (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H))
× nat_trans_comp
    (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F ∙ H))
    (functor_composite_data
       (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
       (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H))
    (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F ∙ H)) φ
    (make_nat_trans
       (functor_composite_data
          (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
          (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H))
       (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3 (F ∙ H))
       (λ G : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1, α_functors G F H)
       (λ (G G' : pr1 A0 ⟶ B1) (α : G ⟹ G'),
        nat_trans_eq B3
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data G F) H)
          (functor_composite_data G'
             (functor_composite_data F H))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data G F) H)
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data G' F) H)
             (functor_composite_data G'
                (functor_composite_data F H))
             (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B2 B3
                (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B2 α F)
                H) (α_functors G' F H))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data G F) H)
             (functor_composite_data G
                (functor_composite_data F H))
             (functor_composite_data G'
                (functor_composite_data F H))
             (α_functors G F H)
             (post_whisker_in_funcat A0 B1 B3 α
                (F ∙ H)))
          (λ a : pr1 A0,
           internal_paths_rew_r
             (B3 ⟦ H (F (G a)), H (F (G' a)) ⟧)

             (# H (# F (pr1 α a)))

              · id₁ (H (F (G' a))) = p)
             (id_right (# H (# F (pr1 α a))))

# H (# F (pr1 α a)) · id₁ (H (F (G' a))) =
id₁ (H (F (G a))) · # (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a))

           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H)))
     ((λ (G G' : functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1)
       (α : functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1 ⟦ G,
            G' ⟧),
       nat_trans_eq B3
         (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
            (F ∙ H) G)
         (functor_composite_data
            (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
            (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H)
            G')
         (# (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
               (F ∙ H)) α · α_functors_inv G' F H)
         (α_functors_inv G F H
          · # (functor_composite_data
                 (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1
                    B2 F)
                 (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2
                    B3 H)) α)
         (λ a : pr1 A0,
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (B3 ⟦ H (F (G a)), H (F (G' a)) ⟧)
            (id₁ (H (F (G a)))
             · # (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a)))
            (# (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a)))
            (λ p : B3 ⟦ H (F (G a)), H (F (G' a)) ⟧,
             # H (# F (pr1 α a)) · id₁ (H (F (G' a))) =
             p)
            (id_right
               (# (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a))))
            (id_left (# (pr1 H) (# (pr1 F) (pr1 α a))))
          :
          (# (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
                (F ∙ H)) α · α_functors_inv G' F H) a =
          (α_functors_inv G F H
           · # (functor_composite_data
                  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1
                     B2 F)
                  (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2
                     B3 H)) α) a))
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
           (F ∙ H))
        (functor_composite_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H))
        ((λ G : functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B1,
          α_functors_inv G F H
          :
          functor_precategory_data (pr1 A0) B3
          ⟦ post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
              (F ∙ H) G,
          functor_composite_data
            (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2 F)
            (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3 H)
            G ⟧)
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B3
              (F ∙ H))
           (functor_composite_data
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B1 B2
                 F)
              (post_composition_functor_data A0 B2 B3
                 H)))))
 split; apply (nat_trans_eq (homset_property (functor_category _ _)));
          intro G; cbn; apply (nat_trans_eq (homset_property _)); intro a; apply id_left.
Defined.

End FunctorCategoryWithFixedSource.

End ThePseudoFunctors.

Section Currying.

  Context (B0 : ob CAT).

  Let L := binproductleft_psfunctor B0.
  Let R := functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0.

(* to observe the type of the goal: match goal with | |- ?f => set (goal := f) end. *)


  
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
pstrans_data (id_psfunctor CAT) (comp_psfunctor R L)

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
∏ (X Y : CAT) (f : CAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (?η₁ X · # (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor CAT) f · ?η₁ Y)

∏ X : CAT,

 apply coevaluation_functor.

invertible_2cell
  ((λ A : CAT, coevaluation_functor) X
   · # (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor CAT) f
   · (λ A : CAT, coevaluation_functor) Y)

   · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)

   · (λ A : CAT, coevaluation_functor) A')

B0: CAT

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b: pr1 B0
precategory_binproduct_data A' B0
⟦ functor_composite_data
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
       (precategory_binproduct A B0)
       binswap_pair_functor a)
    (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))
    b,
functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
  (precategory_binproduct A' B0) binswap_pair_functor
  (F a) b ⟧
 apply identity.
                
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
is_nat_trans
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a)
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a))
  ((λ b : pr1 B0,
    id₁
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
         (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
         binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
           (precategory_binproduct A B0)
           binswap_pair_functor a)
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
        (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
        binswap_pair_functor (F a)))
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
# (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a)
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  f
· id₁
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
       (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
       binswap_pair_functor (F a) b') =
id₁
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a) b)
· # (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
       (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
       binswap_pair_functor (F a)) f
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
make_dirprod (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a)) (f · id₁ b') =
make_dirprod (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b · f)

                   
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a) = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f · id₁ b' = id₁ b · f

                   
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a) = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
# F (id₁ a) = id₁ (F a)
 apply functor_id.
                   
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f · id₁ b' = id₁ b · f
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: A
b, b': pr1 B0
f: pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f · id₁ b' = f
 apply id_right.
          
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
is_nat_trans
  (coevaluation_functor · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
  (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor)
  ((λ a : id_psfunctor CAT A,
    make_nat_trans
      (functor_composite_data
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
            (precategory_binproduct A B0)
            binswap_pair_functor a)
         (pair_functor_data F
            (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
      (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
         (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
         binswap_pair_functor (F a))
      ((λ b : pr1 B0,
        id₁
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
             (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
             binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
               (precategory_binproduct A B0)
               binswap_pair_functor a)
            (pair_functor_data F
               (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
            (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
            binswap_pair_functor (F a)))
      ((λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
        pathsdirprod
          (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
             (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a)) (# F (id₁ a))
             (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
              p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
             (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ (F a))
                (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                 # F (id₁ a) = p) (functor_id F a)
                (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
             (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
          (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
             (id₁ b · f) f
             (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
             (id_right f) (id_left f))
        :
        # (functor_composite_data
             (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                binswap_pair_functor a)
             (pair_functor_data F
                (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))) f
        · id₁
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a) b') =
        id₁
          (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
             (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
             binswap_pair_functor (F a) b)
        · # (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a)) f)
       :
       is_nat_trans
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
               (precategory_binproduct A B0)
               binswap_pair_functor a)
            (pair_functor_data F
               (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
            (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
            binswap_pair_functor (F a))
         ((λ b : pr1 B0,
           id₁
             (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
          :
          nat_trans_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a))))
    :
    comp_psfunctor R L A'
    ⟦ (coevaluation_functor · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
        a,
    (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor) a
    ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (coevaluation_functor · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
     (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor))
  
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a, a': id_psfunctor CAT A
g: id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
# (coevaluation_functor · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F) g
· make_nat_trans
    (functor_composite_data
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
          (precategory_binproduct A B0)
          binswap_pair_functor a')
       (pair_functor_data F
          (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
       (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
       binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
    (λ b : pr1 B0,
     id₁
       (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
          (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
          binswap_pair_functor (F a') b))
    (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
     pathsdirprod
       (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
          (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a')) (# F (id₁ a'))
          (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
           p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
          (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
             (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a')) (id₁ (F a'))
             (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
              # F (id₁ a') = p) (functor_id F a')
             (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
          (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
       (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
          (id₁ b · f) f
          (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
          (id_right f) (id_left f))) =
make_nat_trans
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a)
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a))
  (λ b : pr1 B0,
   id₁
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
        (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
        binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
  (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
   pathsdirprod
     (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
        (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a)) (# F (id₁ a))
        (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
         p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
           (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ (F a))
           (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧, # F (id₁ a) = p)
           (functor_id F a) (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
        (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
     (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧) (id₁ b · f)
        f (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
        (id_right f) (id_left f)))
· # (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor) g
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a, a': id_psfunctor CAT A
g: id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a)
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a')
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
  (post_whisker_in_funcat B0
     (productwithfixedelement B0 A)
     (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
     (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg B0 A
        (category_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a a' g)
     (pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
           (precategory_binproduct A B0)
           binswap_pair_functor a')
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
        (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
        binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
     (λ b : pr1 B0, make_dirprod (id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b))
     (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
           (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a')) (# F (id₁ a'))
           (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
            p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
              (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a')) (id₁ (F a'))
              (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
               # F (id₁ a') = p) (functor_id F a')
              (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
           (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
           (id₁ b · f) f
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
           (id_right f) (id_left f)))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a)
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
           (precategory_binproduct A B0)
           binswap_pair_functor a)
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
        (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
        binswap_pair_functor (F a))
     (λ b : pr1 B0, make_dirprod (id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b))
     (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
           (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a)) (# F (id₁ a))
           (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
            p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
              (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ (F a))
              (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧, # F (id₁ a) = p)
              (functor_id F a) (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
           (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
           (id₁ b · f) f
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
           (id_right f) (id_left f))))
  (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg B0 A'
     (category_binproduct A' B0) binswap_pair_functor
     (F a) (F a') (# F g))

              
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a, a': id_psfunctor CAT A
g: id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
∏ x : pr1 B0,
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a)
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a')
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
  (post_whisker_in_funcat B0
     (productwithfixedelement B0 A)
     (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
     (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg B0 A
        (category_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a a' g)
     (pair_functor F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
           (precategory_binproduct A B0)
           binswap_pair_functor a')
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
        (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
        binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
     (λ b : pr1 B0, make_dirprod (id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b))
     (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
           (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a')) (# F (id₁ a'))
           (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
            p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
              (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a')) (id₁ (F a'))
              (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
               # F (id₁ a') = p) (functor_id F a')
              (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
           (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
           (id₁ b · f) f
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
           (id_right f) (id_left f)))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
        binswap_pair_functor a)
     (pair_functor_data F (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a))
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
     binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
  (make_nat_trans
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
           (precategory_binproduct A B0)
           binswap_pair_functor a)
        (pair_functor_data F
           (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
        (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
        binswap_pair_functor (F a))
     (λ b : pr1 B0, make_dirprod (id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b))
     (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
           (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a)) (# F (id₁ a))
           (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
            p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
              (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ (F a))
              (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧, # F (id₁ a) = p)
              (functor_id F a) (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
           (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
           (id₁ b · f) f
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
           (id_right f) (id_left f))))
  (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg B0 A'
     (category_binproduct A' B0) binswap_pair_functor
     (F a) (F a') (# F g)) x

              
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a, a': id_psfunctor CAT A
g: id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
∏ x : pr1 B0,
make_dirprod (# F g · id₁ (F a')) (id₁ x · id₁ x) =
make_dirprod (id₁ (F a) · # F g) (id₁ x · id₁ x)
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a, a': id_psfunctor CAT A
g: id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
b: pr1 B0
make_dirprod (# F g · id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b · id₁ b) =
make_dirprod (id₁ (F a) · # F g) (id₁ b · id₁ b)

B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (coevaluation_functor · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
     (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor)
     ((λ a : id_psfunctor CAT A,
       make_nat_trans
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
               (precategory_binproduct A B0)
               binswap_pair_functor a)
            (pair_functor_data F
               (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
            (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
            binswap_pair_functor (F a))
         ((λ b : pr1 B0,
           id₁
             (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
          :
          nat_trans_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a)))
         ((λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
           pathsdirprod
             (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                (# F (id₁ a))
                (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                 p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                   (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ (F a))
                   (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                    # F (id₁ a) = p) (functor_id F a)
                   (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
                (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
             (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                (id₁ b · f) f
                (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
                (id_right f) (id_left f))
           :
           # (functor_composite_data
                (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                   (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                   binswap_pair_functor a)
                (pair_functor_data F
                   (functor_identity (pr1 B0)))) f
           · id₁
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a) b') =
           id₁
             (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                binswap_pair_functor (F a) b)
           · # (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a)) f)
          :
          is_nat_trans
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a))
            ((λ b : pr1 B0,
              id₁
                (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                   (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                   binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
             :
             nat_trans_data
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                     (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor a)
                  (pair_functor_data F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a))))
       :
       comp_psfunctor R L A'
       ⟦ (coevaluation_functor
          · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F) a,
       (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor)
         a ⟧)
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (coevaluation_functor
         · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
        (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor))
     ((λ (a a' : id_psfunctor CAT A)
       (g : id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
       nat_trans_eq (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
               (precategory_binproduct A B0)
               binswap_pair_functor a)
            (pair_functor_data F
               (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
            (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
            binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
         (nat_trans_comp
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a')
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
            (post_whisker_in_funcat B0
               (productwithfixedelement B0 A)
               (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
               (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
                  B0 A (category_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a a' g)
               (pair_functor F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (make_nat_trans
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                     (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor a')
                  (pair_functor_data F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
               (λ b : pr1 B0,
                make_dirprod (id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b))
               (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                pathsdirprod
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                     (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a'))
                     (# F (id₁ a'))
                     (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                      p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                        (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                        (id₁ (F a'))
                        (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                         # F (id₁ a') = p)
                        (functor_id F a')
                        (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
                     (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                     (id₁ b · f) f
                     (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                      f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                     (id_left f)))))
         (nat_trans_comp
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
            (make_nat_trans
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                     (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor a)
                  (pair_functor_data F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a))
               (λ b : pr1 B0,
                make_dirprod (id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b))
               (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                pathsdirprod
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                     (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                     (# F (id₁ a))
                     (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                      p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                        (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                        (id₁ (F a))
                        (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                         # F (id₁ a) = p)
                        (functor_id F a)
                        (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
                     (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                     (id₁ b · f) f
                     (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                      f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                     (id_left f))))
            (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
               B0 A' (category_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a) (F a')
               (# F g)))
         ((λ b : pr1 B0,
           pathsdirprod
             (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧)
                (id₁ (F a) · # F g) (# F g)
                (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧,
                 # F g · id₁ (F a') = p)
                (id_right (# F g)) (id_left (# F g)))
             (idpath (id₁ b · id₁ b)))
          :
          ∏ x : pr1 B0,
          nat_trans_comp
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a')
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
            (post_whisker_in_funcat B0
               (productwithfixedelement B0 A)
               (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
               (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
                  B0 A (category_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a a' g)
               (pair_functor F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (make_nat_trans
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                     (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor a')
                  (pair_functor_data F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
               (λ b : pr1 B0,
                make_dirprod (id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b))
               (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                pathsdirprod
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                     (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a'))
                     (# F (id₁ a'))
                     (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                      p = id₁ (...) · id₁ (...))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                        (id₁ (...) · id₁ (...))
                        (id₁ (F a'))
                        (λ p : A' ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                         # F ... = p)
                        (functor_id F a')
                        (id_right (id₁ ...)))
                     (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                     (id₁ b · f) f
                     (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                      f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                     (id_left f)))) x =
          nat_trans_comp
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
            (make_nat_trans
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                     (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor a)
                  (pair_functor_data F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a))
               (λ b : pr1 B0,
                make_dirprod (id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b))
               (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                pathsdirprod
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                     (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                     (# F (id₁ a))
                     (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                      p = id₁ (...) · id₁ (...))
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                        (id₁ (...) · id₁ (...))
                        (id₁ (F a))
                        (λ p : A' ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                         # F ... = p) (functor_id F a)
                        (id_right (id₁ ...)))
                     (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                     (id₁ b · f) f
                     (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                      f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                     (id_left f))))
            (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
               B0 A' (category_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a) (F a')
               (# F g)) x)
       :
       # (coevaluation_functor
          · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F) g
       · make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a')
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            id₁
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a') b))
           (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                 (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a'))
                 (# F (id₁ a'))
                 (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                  p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                    (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                    (id₁ (F a'))
                    (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                     # F (id₁ a') = p)
                    (functor_id F a')
                    (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
                 (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ b · f) f
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
                 (id_right f) (id_left f))) =
       make_nat_trans
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
               (precategory_binproduct A B0)
               binswap_pair_functor a)
            (pair_functor_data F
               (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
         (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
            (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
            binswap_pair_functor (F a))
         (λ b : pr1 B0,
          id₁
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
         (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
          pathsdirprod
            (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
               (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a)) (# F (id₁ a))
               (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
               (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                  (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ (F a))
                  (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                   # F (id₁ a) = p) (functor_id F a)
                  (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
               (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
            (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
               (id₁ b · f) f
               (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
               (id_right f) (id_left f)))
       · # (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F
            · coevaluation_functor) g)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (coevaluation_functor
         · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
        (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor)
        ((λ a : id_psfunctor CAT A,
          make_nat_trans
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                  (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor a)
               (pair_functor_data F
                  (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
            (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
               (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
               binswap_pair_functor (F a))
            ((λ b : pr1 B0,
              id₁
                (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                   (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                   binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
             :
             nat_trans_data
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                     (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor a)
                  (pair_functor_data F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a)))
            ((λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
              (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
              pathsdirprod
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                   (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                   (# F (id₁ a))
                   (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                    p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                      (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                      (id₁ (F a))
                      (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                       # F (...) = p) (functor_id F a)
                      (id_right (id₁ (...))))
                   (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
                (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                   (id₁ b · f) f
                   (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
                   (id_right f) (id_left f))
              :
              # (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                      (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                      binswap_pair_functor a)
                   (pair_functor_data F
                      (functor_identity (...)))) f
              · id₁
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor (F a) b') =
              id₁
                (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                   (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                   binswap_pair_functor (F a) b)
              · # (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor (F a)) f)
             :
             is_nat_trans
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                     (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor a)
                  (pair_functor_data F
                     (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
               (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                  (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                  binswap_pair_functor (F a))
               ((λ b : pr1 B0,
                 id₁
                   (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                      (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                      binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
                :
                nat_trans_data
                  (functor_composite_data
                     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                        (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                        binswap_pair_functor a)
                     (pair_functor_data F
                        (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
                  (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                     (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                     binswap_pair_functor (F a))))
          :
          comp_psfunctor R L A'
          ⟦ (coevaluation_functor
             · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F) a,
          (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F
           · coevaluation_functor) a ⟧)
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (coevaluation_functor
            · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
           (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F
            · coevaluation_functor))))
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: id_psfunctor CAT A
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (coevaluation_functor · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
     (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor)
     (λ a : id_psfunctor CAT A,
      make_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
              (precategory_binproduct A B0)
              binswap_pair_functor a)
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
           (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
           binswap_pair_functor (F a))
        (λ b : pr1 B0,
         id₁
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
        (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
              (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a)) (# F (id₁ a))
              (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
               p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a)) (id₁ (F a))
                 (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                  # F (id₁ a) = p) (functor_id F a)
                 (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
              (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
           (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
              (id₁ b · f) f
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
              (id_right f) (id_left f))))
     (λ (a a' : id_psfunctor CAT A)
      (g : id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
      nat_trans_eq (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
              (precategory_binproduct A B0)
              binswap_pair_functor a)
           (pair_functor_data F
              (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
           (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
           binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a)
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a')
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
           (post_whisker_in_funcat B0
              (productwithfixedelement B0 A)
              (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
              (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
                 B0 A (category_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a a' g)
              (pair_functor F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (make_nat_trans
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a')
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
              (λ b : pr1 B0,
               make_dirprod (id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b))
              (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
               (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
               pathsdirprod
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                    (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a'))
                    (# F (id₁ a'))
                    (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                     p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                       (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                       (id₁ (F a'))
                       (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                        # F (id₁ a') = p)
                       (functor_id F a')
                       (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
                    (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                    (id₁ b · f) f
                    (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                     f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                    (id_left f)))))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a)
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
           (make_nat_trans
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a)
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a))
              (λ b : pr1 B0,
               make_dirprod (id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b))
              (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
               (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
               pathsdirprod
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                    (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                    (# F (id₁ a))
                    (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                     p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                       (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                       (id₁ (F a))
                       (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                        # F (id₁ a) = p)
                       (functor_id F a)
                       (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
                    (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                    (id₁ b · f) f
                    (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                     f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                    (id_left f))))
           (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
              B0 A' (category_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a) (F a')
              (# F g)))
        (λ b : pr1 B0,
         pathsdirprod
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧)
              (id₁ (F a) · # F g) (# F g)
              (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧,
               # F g · id₁ (F a') = p)
              (id_right (# F g)) (id_left (# F g)))
           (idpath (id₁ b · id₁ b)))) a)

          
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: id_psfunctor CAT A
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (make_nat_trans
        (coevaluation_functor
         · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
        (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor)
        (λ a : id_psfunctor CAT A,
         make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a)
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a))
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            id₁
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
           (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                 (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                 (# F (id₁ a))
                 (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                  p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                    (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                    (id₁ (F a))
                    (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                     # F (id₁ a) = p) (functor_id F a)
                    (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
                 (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ b · f) f
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
                 (id_right f) (id_left f))))
        (λ (a a' : id_psfunctor CAT A)
         (g : id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
         nat_trans_eq (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a)
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a)
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a')
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat B0
                 (productwithfixedelement B0 A)
                 (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
                 (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
                    B0 A (category_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a a' g)
                 (pair_functor F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (make_nat_trans
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                       (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                       binswap_pair_functor a')
                    (pair_functor_data F
                       (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                    (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
                 (λ b : pr1 B0,
                  make_dirprod (id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b))
                 (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                  (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                  pathsdirprod
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                       (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a'))
                       (# F (id₁ a'))
                       (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                        p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                          (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                          (id₁ (F a'))
                          (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                           # F (id₁ a') = p)
                          (functor_id F a')
                          (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
                       (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧) (id₁ b · f) f
                       (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                        f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                       (id_left f)))))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a)
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
              (make_nat_trans
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                       (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                       binswap_pair_functor a)
                    (pair_functor_data F
                       (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                    (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor (F a))
                 (λ b : pr1 B0,
                  make_dirprod (id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b))
                 (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                  (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                  pathsdirprod
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                       (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                       (# F (id₁ a))
                       (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                        p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                          (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                          (id₁ (F a))
                          (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                           # F (id₁ a) = p)
                          (functor_id F a)
                          (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
                       (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧) (id₁ b · f) f
                       (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                        f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                       (id_left f))))
              (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
                 B0 A' (category_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a) (F a')
                 (# F g)))
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F a) · # F g) (# F g)
                 (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧,
                  # F g · id₁ (F a') = p)
                 (id_right (# F g)) (id_left (# F g)))
              (idpath (id₁ b · id₁ b)))) a))

          
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: id_psfunctor CAT A
b: pr1 B0
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1
     (make_nat_trans
        (coevaluation_functor
         · # (comp_psfunctor R L) F)
        (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F · coevaluation_functor)
        (λ a : id_psfunctor CAT A,
         make_nat_trans
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a)
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a))
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            id₁
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a) b))
           (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                 (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                 (# F (id₁ a))
                 (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                  p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                    (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                    (id₁ (F a))
                    (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                     # F (id₁ a) = p) (functor_id F a)
                    (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
                 (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
              (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ b · f) f
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧, f · id₁ b' = p)
                 (id_right f) (id_left f))))
        (λ (a a' : id_psfunctor CAT A)
         (g : id_psfunctor CAT A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
         nat_trans_eq (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                 (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor a)
              (pair_functor_data F
                 (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
           (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
              (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
              binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a)
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a')
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
              (post_whisker_in_funcat B0
                 (productwithfixedelement B0 A)
                 (productwithfixedelement B0 A')
                 (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
                    B0 A (category_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a a' g)
                 (pair_functor F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (make_nat_trans
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                       (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                       binswap_pair_functor a')
                    (pair_functor_data F
                       (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                    (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
                 (λ b : pr1 B0,
                  make_dirprod (id₁ (F a')) (id₁ b))
                 (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                  (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                  pathsdirprod
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                       (# F (id₁ a') · id₁ (F a'))
                       (# F (id₁ a'))
                       (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                        p = id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧)
                          (id₁ (F a') · id₁ (F a'))
                          (id₁ (F a'))
                          (λ p : A' ⟦ F a', F a' ⟧,
                           # F (id₁ a') = p)
                          (functor_id F a')
                          (id_right (id₁ (F a'))))
                       (id_right (# F (id₁ a'))))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧) (id₁ b · f) f
                       (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                        f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                       (id_left f)))))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                    (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor a)
                 (pair_functor_data F
                    (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a))
              (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                 (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a'))
              (make_nat_trans
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A
                       (precategory_binproduct A B0)
                       binswap_pair_functor a)
                    (pair_functor_data F
                       (functor_identity (pr1 B0))))
                 (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 A'
                    (precategory_binproduct A' B0)
                    binswap_pair_functor (F a))
                 (λ b : pr1 B0,
                  make_dirprod (id₁ (F a)) (id₁ b))
                 (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                  (f : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                  pathsdirprod
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                       (# F (id₁ a) · id₁ (F a))
                       (# F (id₁ a))
                       (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                        p = id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧)
                          (id₁ (F a) · id₁ (F a))
                          (id₁ (F a))
                          (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a ⟧,
                           # F (id₁ a) = p)
                          (functor_id F a)
                          (id_right (id₁ (F a))))
                       (id_right (# F (id₁ a))))
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧) (id₁ b · f) f
                       (λ p : B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧,
                        f · id₁ b' = p) (id_right f)
                       (id_left f))))
              (nat_trans_from_functor_fix_snd_morphism_arg
                 B0 A' (category_binproduct A' B0)
                 binswap_pair_functor (F a) (F a')
                 (# F g)))
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r (A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (F a) · # F g) (# F g)
                 (λ p : A' ⟦ F a, F a' ⟧,
                  # F g · id₁ (F a') = p)
                 (id_right (# F g)) (id_left (# F g)))
              (idpath (id₁ b · id₁ b)))) a) b)

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT

          apply identity_is_z_iso.
  Defined.

B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
∏ (X Y : CAT) (f g : CAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells (comp_psfunctor R L) α)
• pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data X Y g =
pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells (id_psfunctor CAT) α
   ▹ pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data Y)

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
∏ X : CAT,
(pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (comp_psfunctor R L) X)
• pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data X))
• (psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor CAT) X
   ▹ pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data X)

L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
∏ (X Y Z : CAT) (f : CAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (g : CAT ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (comp_psfunctor R L) f g)
• pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator (pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data X)
      (# (comp_psfunctor R L) f)
      (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g)
    • (pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data X Y f
       ▹ # (comp_psfunctor R L) g))
   • rassociator (# (id_psfunctor CAT) f)
       (pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data Y)
       (# (comp_psfunctor R L) g))
  • (# (id_psfunctor CAT) f
     ◃ pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (id_psfunctor CAT) f)
     (# (id_psfunctor CAT) g)
     (pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor CAT) f g
   ▹ pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data Z)

L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
∏ (X Y : CAT) (f g : CAT ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),

 ◃ psfunctor_on_cells (comp_psfunctor R L) α)
• pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data X Y g =
pr2 coevaluation_pstrans_data X Y f
• (psfunctor_on_cells (id_psfunctor CAT) α
   ▹ pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data Y)

B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT
(pr1 coevaluation_pstrans_data A

· id₁
    ((# (comp_psfunctor L R) F · evaluation_functor)
       Gb') =
id₁
  ((# (comp_psfunctor L R) F · evaluation_functor) Gb)
· # (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F · evaluation_functor) βg

B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (evaluation_functor · # (id_psfunctor CAT) F)
     (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F · evaluation_functor)
     ((λ Gb : comp_psfunctor L R A,
       id₁
         ((# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
           · evaluation_functor) Gb))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (evaluation_functor · # (id_psfunctor CAT) F)
        (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F · evaluation_functor))
     ((λ (Gb Gb' : comp_psfunctor L R A)
       (βg : comp_psfunctor L R A ⟦ Gb, Gb' ⟧),
       (λ (G : R A) (b : B0)
        (βg0 : comp_psfunctor L R A ⟦ G,, b, Gb' ⟧),
        (λ (G' : R A) (b' : B0)
         (βg1 : comp_psfunctor L R A ⟦ G,, b, G',, b'
                ⟧),
         (λ (β : R A ⟦ pr1 (G,, b), pr1 (G',, b') ⟧)
          (g : B0 ⟦ pr2 (G,, b), pr2 (G',, b') ⟧),
          internal_paths_rew_r
            (A' ⟦ F (G b), F (G' b') ⟧)
            (id₁ (F (G b))
             · (# F (# G g) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 β b')))
            (# F (# G g) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 β b'))
            (λ p : A' ⟦ F (G b), F (G' b') ⟧,
             # F (# G g · pr1 β b') · id₁ (F (G' b')) =
             p)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (A' ⟦ F (pr1 G b), F (G' b') ⟧)
               (# F (# G g · pr1 β b')
                · id₁ (F (G' b')))
               (# F (# G g · pr1 β b'))
               (λ p : A' ⟦ F (pr1 G b), F (G' b') ⟧,
                p = # F (# G g) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 β b'))
               (functor_comp F (# G g) (pr1 β b'))
               (id_right (# F (# G g · pr1 β b'))))
            (id_left
               (# F (# G g) · # (pr1 F) (pr1 β b')))
          :
          # (evaluation_functor
             · # (id_psfunctor CAT) F) (β,, g)
          · id₁
              ((# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
                · evaluation_functor) (G',, b')) =
          id₁
            ((# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
              · evaluation_functor) (G,, b))
          · # (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
               · evaluation_functor) (β,, g))
           (pr1 βg1) (pr2 βg1)) (pr1 Gb') (pr2 Gb')
          βg0) (pr1 Gb) (pr2 Gb) βg)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (evaluation_functor · # (id_psfunctor CAT) F)
        (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F · evaluation_functor)
        ((λ Gb : comp_psfunctor L R A,
          id₁
            ((# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
              · evaluation_functor) Gb))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (evaluation_functor
            · # (id_psfunctor CAT) F)
           (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
            · evaluation_functor))))
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
a: comp_psfunctor L R A
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (evaluation_functor · # (id_psfunctor CAT) F)
     (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F · evaluation_functor)
     (λ Gb : comp_psfunctor L R A,
      id₁
        ((# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
          · evaluation_functor) Gb))
     (λ (Gb Gb' : comp_psfunctor L R A)
      (βg : comp_psfunctor L R A ⟦ Gb, Gb' ⟧),
      internal_paths_rew_r
        (A' ⟦ F (pr1 Gb (pr2 Gb)),
         F (pr1 Gb' (pr2 Gb')) ⟧)
        (id₁ (F (pr1 Gb (pr2 Gb)))
         · (# F (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg))
            · # (pr1 F) ((pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb'))))
        (# F (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg))
         · # (pr1 F) ((pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb')))
        (λ p : A' ⟦ F (pr1 Gb (pr2 Gb)),
               F (pr1 Gb' (pr2 Gb')) ⟧,
         # F
           (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg) · (pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb'))
         · id₁ (F (pr1 Gb' (pr2 Gb'))) = p)
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (A' ⟦ F ((pr11 Gb) (pr2 Gb)),
            F (pr1 Gb' (pr2 Gb')) ⟧)
           (# F
              (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg)
               · (pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb'))
            · id₁ (F (pr1 Gb' (pr2 Gb'))))
           (# F
              (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg)
               · (pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb')))
           (λ p : A' ⟦ F ((pr11 Gb) (pr2 Gb)),
                  F (pr1 Gb' (pr2 Gb')) ⟧,
            p =
            # F (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg))
            · # (pr1 F) ((pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb')))
           (functor_comp F (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg))
              ((pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb')))
           (id_right
              (# F
                 (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg)
                  · (pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb')))))
        (id_left
           (# F (# (pr1 Gb) (pr2 βg))
            · # (pr1 F) ((pr11 βg) (pr2 Gb'))))) a)

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT

a: comp_psfunctor L R A
is_z_isomorphism (id₁ (F (pr1 a (pr2 a))))

        apply identity_is_z_iso.

A1, A2, A3: CAT

H: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
Gb: (pr111 (comp_psfunctor L R)) A1
((pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A1
  ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor CAT) F H)
 • pr2 evaluation_pstrans_data A1 A3 (F · H)) Gb =
(((((lassociator (pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A1)
       (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F)
       (# (id_psfunctor CAT) H)
     • (pr2 evaluation_pstrans_data A1 A2 F
        ▹ # (id_psfunctor CAT) H))
    • rassociator (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F)
        (pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A2)
        (# (id_psfunctor CAT) H))
   • (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
      ◃ pr2 evaluation_pstrans_data A2 A3 H))
  • lassociator (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F)
      (# (comp_psfunctor L R) H)
      (pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A3))
 • (psfunctor_comp (comp_psfunctor L R) F H
    ▹ pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A3)) Gb

L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
H: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
G: R A1
b: B0
((pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A1
  ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor CAT) F H)
 • pr2 evaluation_pstrans_data A1 A3 (F · H)) (G,, b) =
(((((lassociator (pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A1)
       (# (id_psfunctor CAT) F)
       (# (id_psfunctor CAT) H)
     • (pr2 evaluation_pstrans_data A1 A2 F
        ▹ # (id_psfunctor CAT) H))
    • rassociator (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F)
        (pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A2)
        (# (id_psfunctor CAT) H))
   • (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F
      ◃ pr2 evaluation_pstrans_data A2 A3 H))
  • lassociator (# (comp_psfunctor L R) F)
      (# (comp_psfunctor L R) H)
      (pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A3))
 • (psfunctor_comp (comp_psfunctor L R) F H
    ▹ pr1 evaluation_pstrans_data A3)) (G,, b)
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A1, A2, A3: CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A1, A2 ⟧
H: CAT ⟦ A2, A3 ⟧
G: R A1
b: B0
id₁ (H (F (pr1 G b))) · id₁ (H (F (G b))) =
id₁ (H (F (pr1 G b))) · # (pr1 H) (id₁ (F (G b)))
· id₁ (H (F (G b))) · id₁ (H (F (G b)))
· id₁ (H (F (G b)))
· (# H (# F (# G (id₁ b · id₁ b)))
   · (id₁ (H (F (G b))) · id₁ (H (F (G b)))))

b: B0
id₁ (H (F (pr1 G b))) =
id₁ (H (F (pr1 G b))) · # (pr1 H) (id₁ (F (G b)))
· # H (# F (# G (id₁ b)))
