B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT
is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
        A) (id_pstrans L A)
     ((λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans L A))
     ((λ (ab ab' : L A) (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
       pathsdirprod
         (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
            (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
            (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
            (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
             p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
            (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
            (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
            (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
            (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
             pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') · id₁ (pr2 ab') =
             p)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
               (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
               (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
               (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                p = pr2 fg) (id_right (pr2 fg))
               (id_right (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))))
            (id_left (pr2 fg)))
       :
       # (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A) fg
       · id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab') =
       id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab) · # (id_pstrans L A) fg)
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans L A)
        ((λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
           (id_pstrans L A))))
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT
ab: L A
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
        A) (id_pstrans L A)
     (λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
     (λ (ab ab' : L A) (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
      pathsdirprod
        (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
           (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
           (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
            p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
           (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
           (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
           (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
           (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
            pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
              (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab') · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
              (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
              (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
               p = pr2 fg) (id_right (pr2 fg))
              (id_right (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))))
           (id_left (pr2 fg)))) ab)

L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT
ab: L A
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT

aux:= id₁ ab: pr1 (productwithfixedelement B0 A) ⟦ ab, ab ⟧

  (make_dirprod (id₁ (pr1 ab)) (id₁ (pr2 ab)))

        
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT
ab: L A
aux:= id₁ ab: pr1 (productwithfixedelement B0 A) ⟦ ab, ab ⟧
is_z_isomorphism aux

        apply identity_is_z_iso.
    
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
is_modification
  ((λ A : CAT,
    nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
      (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
         A) (id_pstrans L A)
      (make_nat_z_iso
         (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
         (id_pstrans L A)
         (make_nat_trans
            (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
            (id_pstrans L A)
            ((λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
             :
             nat_trans_data
               (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
               (id_pstrans L A))
            ((λ (ab ab' : L A) (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
              pathsdirprod
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                   (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg
                    · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                   (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                   (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                    p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                   (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
                   (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                   (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                   (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                    pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                    · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                      (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                       · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                      (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                      (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                       p = pr2 fg) (id_right (pr2 fg))
                      (id_right
                         (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))))
                   (id_left (pr2 fg)))
              :
              # (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                   currying_biajd_unit_counit A) fg
              · id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab') =
              id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab)
              · # (id_pstrans L A) fg)
             :
             is_nat_trans
               (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
               (id_pstrans L A)
               ((λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
                :
                nat_trans_data
                  (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
                  (id_pstrans L A))))
         ((λ ab : L A,
           (let aux := id₁ ab in identity_is_z_iso ab)
           :
           is_z_isomorphism
             (make_nat_trans
                (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                   currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
                (id_pstrans L A)
                (λ ab0 : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab0))
                (λ (ab0 ab' : L A)
                 (fg : L A ⟦ ab0, ab' ⟧),
                 pathsdirprod
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (A ⟦ pr1 ab0, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                      (id₁ (pr1 ab0) · pr1 fg
                       · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                      (id₁ (pr1 ab0) · pr1 fg)
                      (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab0, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                       p = id₁ (...) · pr1 fg)
                      (idpath (id₁ (...) · pr1 fg))
                      (id_right (id₁ (...) · pr1 fg)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab0, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                      (id₁ (pr2 ab0) · pr2 fg)
                      (pr2 fg)
                      (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab0, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                       pr2 fg · id₁ ... · id₁ (...) =
                       p)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab0, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                         (pr2 fg · id₁ ... · id₁ (...))
                         (pr2 fg · id₁ (...))
                         (λ p : B0 ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                          p = pr2 fg)
                         (id_right (pr2 fg))
                         (id_right (... · ...)))
                      (id_left (pr2 fg)))) ab))
          :
          is_nat_z_iso
            (make_nat_trans
               (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
               (id_pstrans L A)
               ((λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
                :
                nat_trans_data
                  (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
                  (id_pstrans L A))
               ((λ (ab ab' : L A)
                 (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
                 pathsdirprod
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                      (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg
                       · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                      (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                      (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                       p = id₁ (...) · pr1 fg)
                      (idpath (id₁ (...) · pr1 fg))
                      (id_right (id₁ (...) · pr1 fg)))
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                      (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                      (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                       pr2 fg · id₁ ... · id₁ (...) =
                       p)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r
                         (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                         (pr2 fg · id₁ ... · id₁ (...))
                         (pr2 fg · id₁ (...))
                         (λ p : B0 ⟦ ..., ... ⟧,
                          p = pr2 fg)
                         (id_right (pr2 fg))
                         (id_right (... · ...)))
                      (id_left (pr2 fg)))
                 :
                 # (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                      currying_biajd_unit_counit A) fg
                 · id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab') =
                 id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab)
                 · # (id_pstrans L A) fg)
                :
                is_nat_trans
                  (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
                  (id_pstrans L A)
                  ((λ ab : L A,
                    id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
                   :
                   nat_trans_data
                     (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                        currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
                     (id_pstrans L A)))))))
   :
   invertible_modification_data
     (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit)
     (id_pstrans L))
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
psnaturality_of
  (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit) F
• (# L F
   ◃ (λ A : CAT,
      nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
        (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans L A)
        (make_nat_z_iso
           (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
           (id_pstrans L A)
           (make_nat_trans
              (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                 currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
              (id_pstrans L A)
              (λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
              (λ (ab ab' : L A)
               (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
               pathsdirprod
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                    (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg
                     · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                    (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                    (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                     p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                    (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
                    (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                    (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                    (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                     pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                     · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r
                       (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                       (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                        · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                       (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                       (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                        p = pr2 fg)
                       (id_right (pr2 fg))
                       (id_right
                          (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))))
                    (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
           (λ ab : L A,
            let aux := id₁ ab in identity_is_z_iso ab)))
       A') =
((λ A : CAT,
  nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
    (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
    (id_pstrans L A)
    (make_nat_z_iso
       (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
          currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
       (id_pstrans L A)
       (make_nat_trans
          (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
             currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
          (id_pstrans L A)
          (λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
          (λ (ab ab' : L A) (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
           pathsdirprod
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                 p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
                (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                 pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                 · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                   (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                    · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                   (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                   (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                    p = pr2 fg) (id_right (pr2 fg))
                   (id_right (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))))
                (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
       (λ ab : L A,
        let aux := id₁ ab in identity_is_z_iso ab))) A
 ▹ # L F) • psnaturality_of (id_pstrans L) F

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
∏ x : L A,
(psnaturality_of
   (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit) F
 • (# L F
    ◃ (λ A : CAT,
       nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
         (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
         (id_pstrans L A)
         (make_nat_z_iso
            (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
            (id_pstrans L A)
            (make_nat_trans
               (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
               (id_pstrans L A)
               (λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
               (λ (ab ab' : L A)
                (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
                pathsdirprod
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                     (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg
                      · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                     (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                     (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                      p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                     (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
                     (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                     (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                     (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                      pr2 fg · id₁ (...)
                      · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                        (pr2 fg · id₁ (...)
                         · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                        (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                         p = pr2 fg)
                        (id_right (pr2 fg))
                        (id_right (pr2 fg · id₁ ...)))
                     (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
            (λ ab : L A,
             let aux := id₁ ab in identity_is_z_iso ab)))
        A')) x =
(((λ A : CAT,
   nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
     (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
        A) (id_pstrans L A)
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans L A)
        (make_nat_trans
           (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
           (id_pstrans L A)
           (λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
           (λ (ab ab' : L A) (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg
                  · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                 (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
                 (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (...) · id₁ (pr2 ab') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                    (pr2 fg · id₁ (...)
                     · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                    (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                    (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                     p = pr2 fg) (id_right (pr2 fg))
                    (id_right (pr2 fg · id₁ ...)))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (λ ab : L A,
         let aux := id₁ ab in identity_is_z_iso ab)))
    A ▹ # L F) • psnaturality_of (id_pstrans L) F) x

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
ab: L A
(psnaturality_of
   (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit) F
 • (# L F
    ◃ (λ A : CAT,
       nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
         (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
         (id_pstrans L A)
         (make_nat_z_iso
            (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
            (id_pstrans L A)
            (make_nat_trans
               (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
               (id_pstrans L A)
               (λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
               (λ (ab ab' : L A)
                (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
                pathsdirprod
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                     (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg
                      · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                     (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                     (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                      p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                     (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
                     (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                     (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                     (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                      pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                      · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                     (internal_paths_rew_r
                        (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                        (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                         · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                        (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                        (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                         p = pr2 fg)
                        (id_right (pr2 fg))
                        (id_right (pr2 fg · id₁ (...))))
                     (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
            (λ ab : L A,
             let aux := id₁ ab in identity_is_z_iso ab)))
        A')) ab =
(((λ A : CAT,
   nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
     (biadj_triangle_l_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
        A) (id_pstrans L A)
     (make_nat_z_iso
        (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans L A)
        (make_nat_trans
           (biadj_triangle_l_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
           (id_pstrans L A)
           (λ ab : L A, id₁ (id_pstrans L A ab))
           (λ (ab ab' : L A) (fg : L A ⟦ ab, ab' ⟧),
            pathsdirprod
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg
                  · id₁ (pr1 ab'))
                 (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 ab, pr1 ab' ⟧,
                  p = id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)
                 (idpath (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg))
                 (id_right (id₁ (pr1 ab) · pr1 fg)))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (pr2 ab) · pr2 fg) (pr2 fg)
                 (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                  pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                  · id₁ (pr2 ab') = p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧)
                    (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab')
                     · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                    (pr2 fg · id₁ (pr2 ab'))
                    (λ p : B0 ⟦ pr2 ab, pr2 ab' ⟧,
                     p = pr2 fg) (id_right (pr2 fg))
                    (id_right (pr2 fg · id₁ (...))))
                 (id_left (pr2 fg)))))
        (λ ab : L A,
         let aux := id₁ ab in identity_is_z_iso ab)))
    A ▹ # L F) • psnaturality_of (id_pstrans L) F) ab
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
ab: L A
make_dirprod
  (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
      · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
         · (id₁ (F (...)) · (id₁ (...) · id₁ (...))
            · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
            · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
         · (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
            · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))))
         · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
      · (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
         · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
            · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))
   · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
      · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))))
   · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))
  (id₁ (pr2 ab)
   · (id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab)
         · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · (id₁ (...) · id₁ (...))
            · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
            · id₁ (pr2 ab)) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
         · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
            · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)))
         · id₁ (pr2 ab)) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
         · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)))
      · id₁ (pr2 ab)) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
   · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))
   · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)) =
make_dirprod
  (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
   · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))))
  (id₁ (pr2 ab) · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)))

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
ab: L A
id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
· (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
      · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
         · (id₁ (F (...)) · id₁ (F (...)))
         · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
         · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
      · (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
         · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))))
      · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
      · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
         · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))
· id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
· (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))))
· id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) =
# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
· (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
ab: L A
id₁ (pr2 ab)
· (id₁ (pr2 ab)
   · (id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))
         · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))
      · id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
         · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)))
      · id₁ (pr2 ab)) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
   · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)))
   · id₁ (pr2 ab)) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
· (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))
· id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) =
id₁ (pr2 ab) · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT

      · (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))

      · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · (# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
      · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))

· (id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
   · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))))
· id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) =
# F (id₁ (pr1 ab))
· (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab)))

      · (id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) · id₁ (F (pr1 ab))

B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
ab: L A
id₁ (F (pr1 ab)) = id₁ (F (pr1 ab))
 apply idpath.
      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
ab: L A
id₁ (pr2 ab)
· (id₁ (pr2 ab)
   · (id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))
         · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))
      · id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
         · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)))
      · id₁ (pr2 ab)) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
   · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
      · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab)))
   · id₁ (pr2 ab)) · id₁ (pr2 ab)
· (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))
· id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab) =
id₁ (pr2 ab) · (id₁ (pr2 ab) · id₁ (pr2 ab))

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT

id₁ (pr2 ab) = id₁ (pr2 ab)

A: CAT
is_nat_trans
  (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
  (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
  ((λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,
    make_nat_trans
      (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
         A G)
      (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
      ((λ b : pr1 B0,
        id₁
          (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b))
       :
       nat_trans_data
         (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
         (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G))
      ((λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
        internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
          (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
          (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
           # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
          (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
             (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
             (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
             (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
             (id_right (# G g))
             (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
          (id_left (# G g))
        :
        # (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
             currying_biajd_unit_counit A G) g
        · id₁
            (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G
               b') =
        id₁
          (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b)
        · # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            g)
       :
       is_nat_trans
         (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
         (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
         ((λ b : pr1 B0,
           id₁
             (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                G b))
          :
          nat_trans_data
            (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G))))
   :
   nat_trans_data
     (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
        A) (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A))

G, G': currying_biajd_unit_counit A
β: currying_biajd_unit_counit A ⟦ G, G' ⟧
# (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
  β
· make_nat_trans
    (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit A
       G')
    (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
    (λ b : pr1 B0,
     id₁
       (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G' b))
    (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
     internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧)
       (id₁ (G' b) · # G' g) (# G' g)
       (λ p : A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧,
        # G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b') · id₁ (G' b') = p)
       (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧)
          (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b') · id₁ (G' b'))
          (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))
          (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧, p = # G' g)
          (id_right (# G' g))
          (id_right (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))))
       (id_left (# G' g))) =
make_nat_trans
  (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
  (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
  (λ b : pr1 B0,
   id₁ (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b))
  (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
   internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
     (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
     (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
      # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
        (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
        (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
        (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
        (id_right (# G g))
        (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
     (id_left (# G g)))
· # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A) β

   β

        (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G' b))

        (λ p : A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧,

           (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b') · id₁ (G' b'))
           (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))
           (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧, p = # G' g)
           (id_right (# G' g))
           (id_right (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))))
        (id_left (# G' g)))) x =
(make_nat_trans
   (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit A
      G) (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
   (λ b : pr1 B0,
    id₁ (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b))
   (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
    internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
      (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)

       # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
      (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
         (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
         (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
         (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
         (id_right (# G g))
         (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
      (id_left (# G g)))

is_nat_z_iso
  (make_nat_trans
     (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
        A) (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
     ((λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,
       make_nat_trans
         (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
         (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
         ((λ b : pr1 B0,
           id₁
             (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                G b))
          :
          nat_trans_data
            (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G))
         ((λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
           internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
             (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
             (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
              # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
             (internal_paths_rew_r
                (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
                (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
                (id_right (# G g))
                (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
             (id_left (# G g))
           :
           # (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                currying_biajd_unit_counit A G) g
           · id₁
               (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A G b') =
           id₁
             (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                G b)
           · # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A G) g)
          :
          is_nat_trans
            (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            ((λ b : pr1 B0,
              id₁
                (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A G b))
             :
             nat_trans_data
               (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
               (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A G))))
      :
      nat_trans_data
        (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A))
     ((λ (G G' : currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
       (β : currying_biajd_unit_counit A ⟦ G, G' ⟧),
       nat_trans_eq A
         (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
         (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
         (# (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A) β
          · make_nat_trans
              (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                 currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
              (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                 G')
              (λ b : pr1 B0,
               id₁
                 (id_pstrans
                    currying_biajd_unit_counit A G' b))
              (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
               (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G' b) · # G' g) (# G' g)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                  # G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                  · id₁ (G' b') = p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                    (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                     · id₁ (G' b'))
                    (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))
                    (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                     p = # G' g) (id_right (# G' g))
                    (id_right
                       (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))))
                 (id_left (# G' g))))
         (make_nat_trans
            (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            (λ b : pr1 B0,
             id₁
               (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A G b))
            (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
             internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
               (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
               (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
                # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') =
                p)
               (internal_paths_rew_r
                  (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                  (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
                  (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                  (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧,
                   p = # G g) (id_right (# G g))
                  (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
               (id_left (# G g)))
          · # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
              β)
         (λ b : pr1 B0,
          internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧)
            (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b · id₁ (G' b))
            (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b)
            (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧,
             p = id₁ (G b) · β b)
            (cancel_postcomposition (# G (id₁ b))
               (id₁ (G b)) (β b) (functor_id G b))
            (id_right (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b))
          :
          (# (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                currying_biajd_unit_counit A) β
           · make_nat_trans
               (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
               (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A G')
               (λ b0 : pr1 B0,
                id₁
                  (id_pstrans
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A G'
                     b0))
               (λ (b0 b' : pr1 B0)
                (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b0, b' ⟧),
                internal_paths_rew_r
                  (A ⟦ G' b0, G' b' ⟧)
                  (id₁ (G' b0) · # G' g) (# G' g)
                  (λ p : A ⟦ G' b0, G' b' ⟧,
                   # G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                   · id₁ (G' b') = p)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (A ⟦ pr1 G' b0, G' b' ⟧)
                     (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                      · id₁ (G' b'))
                     (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))
                     (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G' b0, G' b' ⟧,
                      p = # G' g) (id_right (# G' g))
                     (id_right (# G' g · id₁ (...))))
                  (id_left (# G' g)))) b =
          (make_nat_trans
             (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
             (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                G)
             (λ b0 : pr1 B0,
              id₁
                (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A G b0))
             (λ (b0 b' : pr1 B0)
              (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b0, b' ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b0, G b' ⟧)
                (id₁ (G b0) · # G g) (# G g)
                (λ p : A ⟦ G b0, G b' ⟧,
                 # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') =
                 p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ pr1 G b0, G b' ⟧)
                   (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b')
                    · id₁ (G b'))
                   (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                   (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b0, G b' ⟧,
                    p = # G g) (id_right (# G g))
                   (id_right (# G g · id₁ (...))))
                (id_left (# G g)))
           · # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A) β) b))
      :
      is_nat_trans
        (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        ((λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,
          make_nat_trans
            (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
            ((λ b : pr1 B0,
              id₁
                (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A G b))
             :
             nat_trans_data
               (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
               (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A G))
            ((λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
              (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
                (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
                (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
                 # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') =
                 p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                   (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b')
                    · id₁ (G b'))
                   (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                   (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧,
                    p = # G g) (id_right (# G g))
                   (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
                (id_left (# G g))
              :
              # (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                   currying_biajd_unit_counit A G) g
              · id₁
                  (id_pstrans
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b') =
              id₁
                (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A G b)
              · # (id_pstrans
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A G) g)
             :
             is_nat_trans
               (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                  currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
               (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                  A G)
               ((λ b : pr1 B0,
                 id₁
                   (id_pstrans
                      currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b))
                :
                nat_trans_data
                  (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
                  (id_pstrans
                     currying_biajd_unit_counit A G))))
         :
         nat_trans_data
           (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A))))
 
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT
G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
is_z_isomorphism
  (make_nat_trans
     (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
        A) (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
     (λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,
      make_nat_trans
        (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
        (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
        (λ b : pr1 B0,
         id₁
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G
              b))
        (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
         internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
           (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
           (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
            # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
              (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
              (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
              (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
              (id_right (# G g))
              (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
           (id_left (# G g))))
     (λ (G G' : currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
      (β : currying_biajd_unit_counit A ⟦ G, G' ⟧),
      nat_trans_eq A
        (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
        (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
        (# (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A) β
         · make_nat_trans
             (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
             (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                G')
             (λ b : pr1 B0,
              id₁
                (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A G' b))
             (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
              (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
              internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                (id₁ (G' b) · # G' g) (# G' g)
                (λ p : A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                 # G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                 · id₁ (G' b') = p)
                (internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                   (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                    · id₁ (G' b'))
                   (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))
                   (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                    p = # G' g) (id_right (# G' g))
                   (id_right
                      (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))))
                (id_left (# G' g))))
        (make_nat_trans
           (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            id₁
              (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                 G b))
           (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
              (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
               # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                 (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
                 (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
                 (id_right (# G g))
                 (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
              (id_left (# G g)))
         · # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
             β)
        (λ b : pr1 B0,
         internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧)
           (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b · id₁ (G' b))
           (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b)
           (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧,
            p = id₁ (G b) · β b)
           (cancel_postcomposition (# G (id₁ b))
              (id₁ (G b)) (β b) (functor_id G b))
           (id_right (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b)))) G)

L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT
G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
is_nat_z_iso
  (pr1
     (make_nat_trans
        (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,
         make_nat_trans
           (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            id₁
              (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                 G b))
           (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
              (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
               # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                 (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
                 (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
                 (id_right (# G g))
                 (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
              (id_left (# G g))))
        (λ (G G' : currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
         (β : currying_biajd_unit_counit A ⟦ G, G' ⟧),
         nat_trans_eq A
           (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
           (# (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                 currying_biajd_unit_counit A) β
            · make_nat_trans
                (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                   currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
                (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A G')
                (λ b : pr1 B0,
                 id₁
                   (id_pstrans
                      currying_biajd_unit_counit A G'
                      b))
                (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                 (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                   (id₁ (G' b) · # G' g) (# G' g)
                   (λ p : A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                    # G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                    · id₁ (G' b') = p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                      (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                       · id₁ (G' b'))
                      (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))
                      (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                       p = # G' g) (id_right (# G' g))
                      (id_right
                         (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))))
                   (id_left (# G' g))))
           (make_nat_trans
              (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                 currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
              (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                 G)
              (λ b : pr1 B0,
               id₁
                 (id_pstrans
                    currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b))
              (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
               (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
                  # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                    (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b')
                     · id₁ (G b'))
                    (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                    (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧,
                     p = # G g) (id_right (# G g))
                    (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
                 (id_left (# G g)))
            · # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A) β)
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧)
              (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b · id₁ (G' b))
              (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b)
              (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧,
               p = id₁ (G b) · β b)
              (cancel_postcomposition (# G (id₁ b))
                 (id₁ (G b)) (β b) (functor_id G b))
              (id_right (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b)))) G))

L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A: CAT

  (pr1
     (make_nat_trans
        (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
           currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
        (λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,
         make_nat_trans
           (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            id₁
              (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                 G b))
           (λ (b b' : pr1 B0) (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
            internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
              (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)

               # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                 (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
                 (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                 (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
                 (id_right (# G g))
                 (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
              (id_left (# G g))))
        (λ (G G' : currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
         (β : currying_biajd_unit_counit A ⟦ G, G' ⟧),
         nat_trans_eq A
           (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
              currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
           (# (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                 currying_biajd_unit_counit A) β
            · make_nat_trans
                (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                   currying_biajd_unit_counit A G')
                (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A G')
                (λ b : pr1 B0,
                 id₁
                   (id_pstrans
                      currying_biajd_unit_counit A G'
                      b))
                (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
                 (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
                 internal_paths_rew_r
                   (A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                   (id₁ (G' b) · # G' g) (# G' g)
                   (λ p : A ⟦ G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                    # G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                    · id₁ (G' b') = p)
                   (internal_paths_rew_r
                      (A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧)
                      (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b')
                       · id₁ (G' b'))
                      (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))
                      (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G' b, G' b' ⟧,
                       p = # G' g) (id_right (# G' g))
                      (id_right
                         (# G' g · id₁ (pr1 G' b'))))
                   (id_left (# G' g))))
           (make_nat_trans
              (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                 currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
              (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A
                 G)
              (λ b : pr1 B0,
               id₁
                 (id_pstrans
                    currying_biajd_unit_counit A G b))
              (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)
               (g : pr1 B0 ⟦ b, b' ⟧),
               internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧)
                 (id₁ (G b) · # G g) (# G g)
                 (λ p : A ⟦ G b, G b' ⟧,
                  # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') =
                  p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
                    (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b')
                     · id₁ (G b'))
                    (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
                    (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧,
                     p = # G g) (id_right (# G g))
                    (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
                 (id_left (# G g)))
            · # (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit
                   A) β)
           (λ b : pr1 B0,
            internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧)
              (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b · id₁ (G' b))
              (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b)
              (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G' b ⟧,
               p = id₁ (G b) · β b)
              (cancel_postcomposition (# G (id₁ b))
                 (id₁ (G b)) (β b) (functor_id G b))
              (id_right (# G (id₁ b) · pr1 β b)))) G)

B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT

        apply identity_is_z_iso.
    
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
is_modification
  ((λ A : CAT,
    nat_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell
      (biadj_triangle_r_lhs currying_biajd_unit_counit
         A) (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
      (make_nat_z_iso
         (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
            currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
         (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
         (make_nat_trans
            (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
               currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
            (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
            ((λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,
              make_nat_trans
                (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                   currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)

                            currying_biajd_unit_counit
                            A G' b))

              currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
           (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit A)
           (λ G : currying_biajd_unit_counit A,

                    (# G g · id₁ (...))

                    (id_right (# G g))
                    (id_right (... · ...)))

                      (id₁ ... · # G' g) (# G' g)
                      (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                      (internal_paths_rew_r (...)
                         (...) (...) (...) (...) (...))
                      (id_left (...))))
              (make_nat_trans
                 (biadj_triangle_r_lhs
                    currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
                 (id_pstrans
                    currying_biajd_unit_counit A G)
                 (λ b : pr1 B0,
                  id₁
                    (id_pstrans

                       b))
                 (λ (b b' : pr1 B0)

                    (id₁ ... · # G g) (# G g)
                    (λ p : ..., ... = p)
                    (internal_paths_rew_r (...) (...)
                       (...) (...) (...) (...))
                    (id_left (...)))

                      currying_biajd_unit_counit A) β)
              (λ b : pr1 B0,

                 (id_right (# G (...) · pr1 β b)))))

                    (... · ... · id₁ ...)
                    (# G0 ... · pr1 β b)
                    (λ p : ..., p = ...)

                       (...) (...) (...))
                    (id_right (...)))) G)

     (id_pstrans currying_biajd_unit_counit) F) x

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT

B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
nat_trans_comp
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 [pr1 B0, A, A]
           (precategory_binproduct [pr1 B0, A, A] B0)
           binswap_pair_functor G)
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (category_binproduct [B0, A] B0))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor [B0, A] B0)
                 (pr1_functor [B0, A] B0)))
           (uncurry_functor_data B0 [B0, A] A
              (functor_identity
                 (functor_precategory_data B0 A))))) F)
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_data B0 [pr1 B0, A', A']
        (precategory_binproduct [pr1 B0, A', A'] B0)
        binswap_pair_functor (functor_compose G F))
     (functor_composite_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (bindelta_functor_data
              (category_binproduct [B0, A'] B0))
           (pair_functor_data
              (pr2_functor [B0, A'] B0)
              (pr1_functor [B0, A'] B0)))

            # G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b') = p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r (A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧)
              (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b') · id₁ (G b'))
              (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))
              (λ p : A ⟦ pr1 G b, G b' ⟧, p = # G g)
              (id_right (# G g))
              (id_right (# G g · id₁ (pr1 G b'))))
           (id_left (# G g)))) F)
  (nat_trans_comp (functor_composite_data G F)
     (functor_composite_data G F)
     (functor_composite_data G F)
     (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data G F))
     (nat_trans_id (functor_composite_data G F))) b

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
b: pr1 B0
id₁ (F (pr1 G b))
· (id₁ (F (pr1 G b))
   · (id₁ (F (pr1 G b))
      · (id₁ (F (pr1 G b))
         · (id₁ (F (...)) · id₁ (F (...)))
         · id₁ (F (pr1 G b))
         · (id₁ (F (pr1 G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))
            · id₁ (F (G b))) · id₁ (F (G b)))
      · id₁ (F (G b))
      · (# F (# G (id₁ b · id₁ b))
         · (id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))))
      · id₁ (F (G b))) · id₁ (F (G b))
   · (# F (# G (id₁ b)) · id₁ (F (G b)))
   · id₁ (F (G b))) · id₁ (F (G b))
· (# F (# G (id₁ b)) · (id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))))
· id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b)) =
# (pr1 F) (id₁ (G b))
· (id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b)))

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
b: pr1 B0
# F (# G (id₁ b)) · id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))
· id₁ (F (G b)) · (# F (# G (id₁ b)) · id₁ (F (G b)))
· id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))
· (# F (# G (id₁ b)) · id₁ (F (G b))) · id₁ (F (G b))
· id₁ (F (G b)) =
# (pr1 F) (id₁ (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
b: pr1 B0
id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))
· id₁ (F (G b)) · (id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b)))
· id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))
· (id₁ (F (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))) · id₁ (F (G b))
· id₁ (F (G b)) =
# (pr1 F) (id₁ (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT

G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
b: pr1 B0
id₁ (F (G b)) = # (pr1 F) (id₁ (G b)) · id₁ (F (G b))

      
B0: CAT
L:= binproductleft_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
A, A': CAT
F: CAT ⟦ A, A' ⟧
G: currying_biajd_unit_counit A
b: pr1 B0
id₁ (F (G b)) = # (pr1 F) (id₁ (G b))
 apply pathsinv0, functor_id.
  Defined.

left_biadj_data L

R:= functorcategoryright_psfunctor B0: psfunctor CAT CAT
left_biadj_data L

equivalence_of_cats [C, [B0 : category, E]]
  [category_binproduct C B0, E]

    apply (biadj_hom_equivalence currying_biajd).
